title: 神之陨落（Divinity Undone）
description: 解锁并阅读《逝去诸神之书》。（Unlock and read the Book of Dead Gods.）
wiki_description:
Unlock and read the [Book of Dead Gods](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Book_of_Dead_Gods).

- Shared with ⁠[Secrets of the Sundering](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Secrets_of_the_Sundering) inspiration.

title: 西凡那斯之避世（Silvanus' Solitude）
description: 见证封闭林地的仪式。（Witness the ritual that seals off the grove from the world.）
wiki_description: Witness the [ritual](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rite_of_Thorns_(ritual)) that seals off the grove from the world.

title: 暗舞者的最终仪式（Last Rites of the Dark Dancer）
description: 完成伊莉丝翠的悲痛仪式并获得她的祝福之刃。（Complete Eilistraee's ritual of sorrow and obtain her blessed blade.）
wiki_description:
Complete [Eilistraee](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Deities#Eilistraee)'s ritual of sorrow and obtain her [blessed blade](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Phalar_Aluve).

- A character must succeed a [Religion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Religion) check to take the blade, or a [Strength](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Strength) check to bypass the ritual.

title: 齐心戮力（A Unified Spirit）
description: 在渥金的休眠地与焰拳一起祈祷。（Pray with the Flaming Fists at Waukeen's Rest.）
wiki_description:
Pray with the [Flaming Fists](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ephren) at Waukeen's Rest.

- The option to do this is only available to [Clerics](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cleric) of good-aligned deities and [Paladins](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Paladin) (except [Oathbreakers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oathbreaker)).

title: 拯救异教徒（Saving the Heretic）
description: 了解到关于马格鲁比耶的知识并安全解放他的祭司。（Learn about Maglubiyet and safely free his priest.）
wiki_description:
Learn about [Maglubiyet](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Maglubiyet) and safely free [his priest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brakkal).

- A party member must first talk to [Brakkal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brakkal), then get him out of trapped and locked cage. If freeing him first, the inspiration is not gained.

title: 鱼体投地（Tipping the Scales）
description: 获得寇涛鱼人的崇拜。（Earn the worship of the kuo-toa.）
wiki_description:
Earn the worship of the [Kuo-toa](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Festering_Cove).

- Also granted by convincing [BOOOAL](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/BOOOAL) to let you kill in his name.

title: 魔网深渊侍僧（Acolytes of the Demonweb Pits）
description: 说服复仇之炉的蜘蛛保持对罗丝的忠诚。（Persuade the spiders in Grymforge to remain faithful to Lolth.）
wiki_description:
Persuade the spiders in Grymforge to remain faithful to Lolth.

- The inspiration can only be obtained with [Speak with Animals](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Speak_with_Animals) active.

- Despite the description, various ability checks can be used to convince the spiders.

title: 无情之吻（A Kiss Without Mercy）
description: 忍耐劳薇塔的仪式直到阿布狄拉克满意。（Endure the ritual of Loviatar until Abdirak is pleased.）
wiki_description:
Endure the ritual of [Loviatar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Loviatar) until [Abdirak](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Abdirak) is pleased.

- A character must succeed three ability checks on [Performance](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Performance) or [Intimidation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Intimidation) (can be mixed), OR fail three [Constitution](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Constitution) checks.

- Shedding the armour applies the  [Ardent Apostle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ardent_Apostle_(Condition)) condition, helping to endure or imitate pain. Eating any spoiled/rotten food before the ritual applies the  [Poisoned](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Poisoned_(Condition)) condition, which may help to fail Constitution checks.

- Shared with ⁠[The Art of Agony](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#The_Art_of_Agony) inspiration.

title: 命运由我不由天（Fate Must Wait）
description: 复活队伍内的任意成员。（Resurrect anyone in your party.）
wiki_description:
Resurrect anyone in your party.

- Granted for the first resurrection of a party member in a playthrough, regardless of the means (with a spell, a scroll, or with the help of [Withers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Withers)).

title: 祝福的银光（Her Gift of Silver）
description: 通过祈祷找回塞伦涅失落的宝藏。（Recover Selûne's lost treasure through prayer.）
wiki_description:
Recover [Selûne's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sel%C3%BBne) lost treasure through prayer.

- Read the [prayer note](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sel%C3%BBnite_Prayer_Sheet) while next to the locked chest.

- [Shadowheart](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadowheart) cannot open the chest, but still gains the inspiration if she is present.

title: 碎月（Shatter the Moon）
description: 破坏塞伦涅对幽暗地域堡垒的守护。（Destroy Selûne's protection over the Underdark fort.）
wiki_description:
Destroy [Selûne](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Deities#Selûne)'s protection over the Underdark fort.

- Destroy the Moonstone above the statue in the [Selûnite Outpost](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sel%C3%BBnite_Outpost).

title: 树木之父的悲伤（Treefather's Sorrow）
description: 让林地受到西凡那斯的诅咒。（Unleash Silvanus' curse upon the grove.）
wiki_description:
Unleash [Silvanus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Silvanus)' curse upon the grove.

- Kill the druids and steal the [Idol of Silvanus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Idol_of_Silvanus).

title: 盲目正义（Justice Sees All）
description: 发现安德斯背叛提尔的原因。（Discover why Anders betrayed Tyr.）

title: 受福安息（Blessed's Final Rest）
description: 找到阿斯莫的日志。（Find the aasimar's journal.）
wiki_description:
Find the [aasimar's journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Olam%27s_Journal).

- On the desk at X: 47 Y: -1010 in the [House of Healing Morgue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Healing#Entry_Hall_and_Main_Hall).

- Shared with ⁠[Snuffed Spark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Snuffed_Spark) inspiration.

title: 丧钟为他们而鸣（Those for Whom the Bell Tolled）
description: 杀死巴萨扎尔所有的不死生物。（Kill all of Balthazar's undead.）
wiki_description: Kill all of [Balthazar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar)'s undead.

title: 磨练黑暗（Honing the Darkness）
description: 在被诅咒的城镇中间通过莎尔的所有试炼。（Pass all of Shar's tests in the middle of the cursed town.）
wiki_description:
Pass all of Shar's tests in the [middle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharran_Sanctuary) of the cursed town.

- Shared with ⁠[Partaking in Local Customs](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Partaking_in_Local_Customs) inspiration.

title: 悲剧之爱（Tragic Love）
description: 见证乔纳斯的葬礼。（Witness Yonas' funeral.）
wiki_description:
Witness Yonas' funeral.

- Talk to [Meygan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Meygan) while she's mourning [Yonas](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yonas) at the fane at X: -61 Y: 112.

- Obtainable only before Marcus' attempt to kidnap Isobel.

- Shared with ⁠[Memento Mori](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Memento_Mori) inspiration.

title: 恶者不息（No Rest for the Wicked）
description: 协助往日身影完成任务。（Assist He Who Was in his task.）
wiki_description:
Assist [He Who Was](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/He_Who_Was) in his task.

- Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Let Sleeping Dogs Lie](https://bg3.wiki#Let_Sleeping_Dogs_Lie) inspiration.

title: 莫惹是非（Let Sleeping Dogs Lie）
description: 阻止已失之神完成其任务。（Prevent He Who Was from completing his task.）
wiki_description:
Prevent [He Who Was](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/He_Who_Was) from completing his task.

- Either grant [Madeline](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Madeline) forgiveness or make the Shadar-Kai stab himself multiple times.

- Mutually exclusive with ⁠[No Rest for the Wicked](https://bg3.wiki#No_Rest_for_the_Wicked) inspiration.

title: 织月者的祈祷（Moonweaver's Prayer）
description: 见证伊索贝尔维持终焉光芒保护的仪式。（Witness Isobel's ritual to keep up the protection of Last Light.）
wiki_description:
Witness [Isobel's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel_Thorm) ritual to keep up the protection of Last Light.

- Acquired only if the Acolyte character is present when talking to Isobel for the first time.

title: 三之一（A Piece of Three）
description: 拼凑出凯瑟里克效忠对象的真相。（Piece together Ketheric's allegiances.）
wiki_description: Piece together Ketheric's allegiances.

title: 束缚仪式（Cerimonia Compedum）
description: 亲自进行将暗夜之歌送给凯瑟里克的仪式。（Execute the ritual to bring Nightsong to Ketheric yourself.）
wiki_description:
Execute the ritual to bring Nightsong to [Ketheric](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric_Thorm).

- Ally with [Balthazar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar) and allow him to take Nightsong.

- Shared with ⁠[Soldier of Fortune](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Soldier_of_Fortune) inspiration.

title: 警惕仪式（Cerimonia Alārum）
description: 释放暗夜之歌。（Release Nightsong.）
wiki_description:
Release the [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_the_Nightsong).

- Shared with ⁠[Damsel No More](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Damsel_No_More), ⁠[Good Deed of the Day](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Good_Deed_of_the_Day), and ⁠[Soldier of Faith](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Soldier_of_Faith) inspirations.

- Additionally, shared with ⁠[Fickle Allegiances](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Fickle_Allegiances) and ⁠[Rebellious Phase](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Rebellious_Phase), if the party helped Balthazar to reach Shadowfell and betrayed him there.

title: 追随她的脚步（In Her Footsteps）
description: 在莎尔铸铁神殿中通过莎尔的每一个试炼。（Solve each of Shar's trials in the Gauntlet of Shar.）
wiki_description:
Solve each of [Shar's trials](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gauntlet_of_Shar#Trials_of_Shar) in the Gauntlet of Shar.

- Shared with ⁠[Recognised by Shadows](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Recognised_by_Shadows) inspiration and inspirations earned throughout the Self-Same Trial.

title: 唯一生还者（Sole Survivor）
description: 发现莎尔铸铁神殿中众多老鼠背后的真相。（Discover the truth behind the numerous rats in the Gauntlet of Shar.）
wiki_description:
[Discover the truth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Break_Yurgir%27s_Contract) behind the numerous rats in the Gauntlet of Shar.

- Shared with ⁠[Rat King](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Rat_King) inspiration.

title: 做足功课（Did My Homework）
description: 向外科医生背诵莎尔的教条。（Recite Shar's dogma to the surgeon.）
wiki_description:
Recite [Shar's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shar) dogma to the [surgeon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm).

- The interacting character must choose the line with  DC 14 [Religion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Religion) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) and pass it. It is not connected to Malus's notes in his office.

- This check is not available to [Shadowheart](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadowheart), but she still can obtain the inspiration as a companion.

title: 与班恩联手（Shaking Bane's Hand）
description: 同意跟戈塔什结盟。（Agree to an alliance with Gortash.）
wiki_description: Agree to an alliance with [Gortash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gortash).

title: 与巴尔同笑（Grinning with Bhaal）
description: 同意跟奥林结盟。（Agree to an alliance with Orin.）
wiki_description:
Agree to an alliance with [Orin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Orin).

- Granted if the party accept Orin's proposition after she kidnaps a companion. For a [Dark Urge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dark_Urge), accepting a duel challenge also grants the inspiration.

title: 遗忘的血腥之厅（Forgotten, Bloodied, Halls）
description: 发现巴尔神殿。（Discover the Temple of Bhaal.）
wiki_description:
Discover the [Temple of Bhaal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Temple_of_Bhaal).

- Granted upon opening the doors to the temple itself in the [Undercity Ruins](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Undercity_Ruins)

- Shared with ⁠[Homecoming](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Homecoming) and ⁠[The Face of Evil](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#The_Face_of_Evil) inspirations.

title: 真正的驱魔（True Exorcism）
description: 用驱散火炬烧毁凯丽的肖像，并将凯丽从物质位面驱逐。（Burn Kerri's portrait with the Torch of Revocation and banish Kerri from the Material Plane.）
wiki_description:
Burn [Kerri's portrait](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Free_the_Artist#Mystic_Carrion's_Mansion) with the [Torch of Revocation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Torch_of_Revocation) and banish [Kerri](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Echo_of_a_Lost_Love) from the Material Plane.

- Obtainable only if [Oskar Fevras](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar_Fevras) was saved from the [Zhentarim Basement](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim_Basement) in [Act One](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Act_One).

- Shared with ⁠[Flames of Passion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild_Artisan#Flames_of_Passion) and ⁠[Using the Proper Means](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Using_the_Proper_Means) inspirations.

title: 失落仪式（Rites of Loss）
description: 完成心灵绘图。（Complete the Mapping of the Heart.）
wiki_description: Complete the [Mapping of the Heart](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mapping_of_the_Heart).

title: 灵魂的食粮（Food for the Soul）
description: 向捐赠箱里捐献相当于一次长休的食物。（Donate a Long Rest's worth of food to the donation chest.）
wiki_description:
Donate a Long Rest's worth of food to the [donation chest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nestor).[[1]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-1)

- Shared with ⁠[Alms for the Unfortunate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Alms_for_the_Unfortunate), ⁠[Gifts of the Wilds](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#Gifts_of_the_Wilds), ⁠[Sharing the Spoils](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Sharing_the_Spoils), and ⁠[Spare What You Can](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Spare_What_You_Can) inspirations.

title: 血之仪式（Liturgy of Blood）
description: 拥抱巴尔并完成谋杀裁决。（Embrace Bhaal and complete the Murder Tribunal.）
wiki_description:
Embrace Bhaal and complete the [Murder Tribunal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Impress_the_Murder_Tribunal).

- Despite the description, the inspiration is earned if any party member becomes an Unholy Assassin, not only the Dark Urge.

- Shared with ⁠[Death of Innocence](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Death_of_Innocence) and ⁠[Titles for the Collection](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Titles_for_the_Collection) inspirations.

title: 血之厌恶（Revulsion of Blood）
description: 在谋杀裁判所中释放瓦莱里亚。（Free Valeria during the Murder Tribunal.）
wiki_description:
Free [Valeria](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria) during the Murder Tribunal.

- Shared with ⁠[A Step Too Far](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#A_Step_Too_Far) and ⁠[End of the Tribunal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#End_of_the_Tribunal) inspirations.

title: 亡者之遗（What Remains of the Dead）
description: 引导尼娜接受，或者获得力量。（Guide Nina to acceptance or prowess.）
wiki_description:
Guide [Nina](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nina_Dortmell) to acceptance or prowess.

- She can be found in the [Graveyard (Lower City)](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Graveyard_(Lower_City)). Either helping her resurrect her brother or convincing her not to will award the inspiration.

title: 肢解的德里波斯（The Dismemberment of Dribbles）
description: 找齐德里波斯身体的所有碎块并还给卢克修斯。（Find all the pieces of Dribbles' body and return them to Lucretious.）
wiki_description:
Find all the pieces of [Dribbles'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_Dribbles_the_Clown) body and return them to [Lucretious](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lucretious).

- Shared with ⁠[Macabre Enigma](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild_Artisan#Macabre_Enigma), ⁠[Macabre Hunt](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#Macabre_Hunt), and ⁠[Trail of Blood](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Trail_of_Blood) inspirations.

title: 夏芮丝肉体仪式（Carnal Rituals of Sharess）
description: 参与... 呃... 夏芮丝的爱抚里提供的可以谈价的感情体验。（Take part in the... erm... negotiable affection provided in Sharess' Caress.）
wiki_description:
Take part in the... erm... negotiable affection provided in [Sharess' Caress](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharess%27_Caress).

- Unlike other similar inspirations, this one concerns only the deal with the [drow twins](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nym_Orlith).

- The Acolyte character must be the player character's romantic partner, which in general case narrows the variations to Shadowheart only.

- Shared with ⁠[Alternative Vocations](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild_Artisan#Alternative_Vocations) and ⁠[Giving a Private Performance](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Giving_a_Private_Performance) inspirations.

title: 敞开但受伤的心扉（A Wounded Open Heart）
description: 站在心胸狭窄的祭司那边。（Side with the close-minded priest.）
wiki_description:
Side with the [close-minded priest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brother_Bill).

- In the dialogue with the priests, choose "If Father Logan had been pickier, he might still been alive".

title: 蔑视封闭之心（A Scorned Closed Heart）
description: 站在思想开放的祭司那边。（Side with the open-minded priest.）
wiki_description:
Side with the [open-minded priest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brother_Clements).

- In the dialogue with the priests, choose "Sounds like your god would be proud of Father Logan".

title: 众人之需（Needs of the Many）
description: 说服商人让那些擅闯空屋的难民留在他家里。（Persuade the merchant to let the refugee squatters stay in his home.）
wiki_description:
Persuade the [merchant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio) to let the refugee [squatters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ben_Golewits) stay in his home.

- Shared with ⁠[Finders Keepers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Finders_Keepers) and ⁠[Securing Hospitality](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Securing_Hospitality) inspirations.

- Also shared with ⁠[Exerting Judgement](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Exerting_Judgement) inspiration, if the party sided with Ben Golewits.

title: 非凡时期的平凡做法（Ordinary Practises in Extraordinary Times）
description: 向风暴海岸圣所中的一位神祇献上适当的祭品。（Offer appropriate offerings to a deity in the Stormshore Tabernacle.）
wiki_description:
Offer appropriate offerings to a deity in the [Stormshore Tabernacle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stormshore_Tabernacle).

- The offering is the same amount as needed to get a merchant to 100 Attitude as seen [here](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Trading_and_item_pricing#Trader_attitude).

title: 儿童保护机构（Child Protection Agents）
description: 找到并拯救罗拉的女儿，万娜。（Find and rescue Lora's daughter, Vanra.）
wiki_description:
Find and rescue [Lora](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lora_Bergauz)'s daughter, [Vanra](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Save_Vanra).

- Shared with ⁠[Finding Vanra](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Finding_Vanra) inspiration.

title: 献给波涛的贡品（Offerings to the Waves）
description: 为死去的波涛仆役献上一件贡品。（Make an offering for the dead waveservant.）
wiki_description:
Make an offering for the [dead waveservant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Avenge_the_Drowned).

- There are two options to gain this inspiration:

- Place anything into the Offerings Chest in the [Water Queen's House](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Water_Queen%27s_House).

- Speaking to [Allandra Grey](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Allandra_Grey) for the first time, choose the option about any offering, including [Monk](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Monk) and [Barbarian](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barbarian) specific lines.

- Shared with ⁠[Sea Memorial](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Sea_Memorial) inspiration, if obtained from Allandra Grey.

title: 忠诚的考验（A Test of Faithfulness）
description: 让爱情主宰测试你们的关系。（Ask the Master of Love to test your bond.）
wiki_description:
Ask the [Master of Love](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zethino) to test your bond.

- Shared with ⁠[Knowledge of the Heart](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Knowledge_of_the_Heart), if the player character scores the best possible result with their partner.

title: 只是路过（Just Passing Through）
description: 在月亮庇所骗过地精们。（Trick the goblins in Moonhaven.）
wiki_description:
Trick the goblins in Moonhaven.

- Using [Illithid Persuasion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Illithid_Persuasion) does not work.

title: 战争狂（Warmonger）
description: 让格拉特发动叛变 —— 然后选择一边。（Cause Glut to stage a coup - then pick a side.）
wiki_description:
Cause [Glut](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Glut) to stage a coup - then pick a side.

- Report to [Spaw](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Spaw) on eliminating the [duergar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gekh_Coal) near the Ebonlake while having Glut as a party follower.

title: 大摇大摆（Cheese Your Way Through）
description: 穿过盗匪封锁进入教堂。（Talk your way past the bandits and enter the chapel.）
wiki_description:
Talk your way past the bandits and enter the [chapel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ravaged_Beach#Overgrown_Ruins).

- Must convince [Gimblebock](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gimblebock) to flee and then trick [Andorn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Andorn) to let the party inside. If the gang outside is fought, the inspiration is not granted.

- If Gimblebock's gang is chased off and then attacked, the inspiration is given as usual.

title: 银剑不如银舌（Silver Blades, Silver Tongue）
description: 说服凯斯拉克百夫长沃斯和平离开。（Convince Kith'rak Voss to leave without violence.）
wiki_description:
Convince [Kith'rak Voss](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kith%27rak_Voss) to leave without violence.

- Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Conquer the Conquerors](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Conquer_the_Conquerors).

title: 好使的寄生虫（Very Important Parasite）
description: 欺骗地精营地内的任意守卫。（Deceive any of the guards in the goblin camp.）
wiki_description:
Deceive any of the guards in the goblin camp.

- Using [Illithid Persuasion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Illithid_Persuasion) does not work.

title: 自来熟（A Friend to All）
description: 通过对木筏巡逻队撒谎以和平进入复仇之炉。（Gain access to Grymforge peacefully by lying to the raft patrol.）
wiki_description: Gain access to Grymforge peacefully by lying to the [raft patrol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Greymon).

title: 难分彼此（One of Us）
description: 使用鬼婆的面具和平穿过她奴隶守卫的地盘。（Use the hag's mask to peacefully bypass her thralls.）
wiki_description:
Use the [hag's mask](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Whispering_Mask) to peacefully bypass her thralls.

- Granted when a party member with the mask equipped crosses the waterfall behind the corridor guarded by the masked thralls.

- To protect from the effects of the mask,  [Protection from Evil and Good](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Protection_from_Evil_and_Good) can be used.

title: 三碗不过关（Spiked）
description: 在地精营地的酒中下毒。（Poison the beer in the goblin camp.）
wiki_description:
Poison the [beer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp#Centre_Courtyard) in the goblin camp.

- Shared with ⁠[Culling the Crowd](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Culling_the_Crowd) and ⁠[Now It's a Party!](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Now_It's_a_Party!)

title: 魔鬼律师（Devil's Advocate）
description: 在不引起怀疑的情况下审讯死去的夺心魔。（Interrogate the dead mind flayer without drawing suspicion.）
wiki_description: Interrogate the [dead mind flayer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shattered_Sanctum#Ragzlin's_throne) without drawing suspicion.

title: 巧言如簧（A Better Offer）
description: 说服深渊蜘蛛攻击地精。（Convince the pit spiders to attack the goblins.）
wiki_description:
Convince the [pit spiders](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shattered_Sanctum#Spider_pit) to attack the goblins.

- The inspiration can only be obtained with [Speak with Animals](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Speak_with_Animals) active.

title: 利益至上（Anything for a Profit）
description: 从粉碎机身上偷走脚趾戒指并不被发现。（Steal the toe ring from Crusher without getting caught.）
wiki_description:
Steal the [toe ring](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crusher%27s_Ring) from [Crusher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crusher) without getting caught.

- Shared with ⁠[What Price Dignity?](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#What_Price_Dignity?) and mutually exclusive with ⁠[Give Them a Show](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Give_Them_a_Show).

title: 远交近攻（Flexible Diplomacy）
description: 在说服提夫林释放莱埃泽尔后背叛他们。（Betray the tieflings after convincing them to free Lae'zel.）
wiki_description:
Betray the tieflings after convincing them to free [Lae'zel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lae%27zel).

- The party must attack the tieflings through the dialogue.

- If Lae'zel died while escaping the [Nautiloid](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nautiloid), this inspiration cannot be obtained.

title: 镜子大师（Mirror Master）
description: 欺骗塞尔地下室中的魔镜。（Trick the magic mirror in the Thayan cellar.）
wiki_description: Trick or intimidate the [magic mirror](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ornate_Mirror) in the [Thayan cellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Apothecary%27s_Cellar).

title: 八面来风（The Importance of Networking）
description: 一路打嘴炮进入散塔林会藏匿处。（Talk your way into the Zhentarim hideout.）
wiki_description:
Talk your way into the [Zhentarim hideout](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim_Basement).

- The inspiration is granted after the party convince [Zarys](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zarys) to let them in.

title: 灰色道德（Morally Grey）
description: 背叛月出或是终焉光芒的信任。（Betray the trust of Moonrise or Last Light.）
wiki_description:
Betray the trust of Moonrise or Lastlight.

- This can happen in [Moonrise Towers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers) or [Last Light Inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn)

title: 善意谎言（Little White Lies）
description: 对阿拉贝尔父母的命运撒谎。（Lie to Arabella about the fate of her parents.）

title: 行业手段（Tricks of the Trade）
description: 成功假装从杯子里喝了酒。（Successfully pretend to drink from the steins of ale.）
wiki_description:
Successfully pretend to drink from the steins of ale.

- During dialog with [Thisobald Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm), pass all three [Sleight of Hand](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sleight_of_Hand) checks to feign drinking.

title: 不是第一次了（Not My First Time）
description: 在与贾希拉交谈时抵抗住吐真剂的影响。（Resist the truth serum when talking to Jaheira.）

title: 永远相信不诚实的人（Always Trust a Dishonest Person）
description: 向竖琴手同盟告发马库斯。（Expose Marcus to the Harpers.）
wiki_description:
Expose [Marcus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) to the Harpers.

- Only available if Tieflings weren't saved -- if Mol is alive she will vouch for the party instead of Marcus.

title: 蝌蚪的团结（Tadpole Solidarity）
description: 遵从马库斯的计划。（Go along with Marcus' plan.）
wiki_description: Go along with [Marcus'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) plan.

title: 洗牌（Shuffling the Board）
description: 对枪板棋做手脚。（Rig the game of lanceboard.）
wiki_description: Rig the [game of lanceboard](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol#Lanceboard_with_Raphael).

title: 魔笛手（Pied Piper）
description: 成功地影响了豺狼人，令其挣脱束缚，或者继续顺从。（Successfully influence the gnolls, either to break free or continue being subservient.）
wiki_description: Successfully influence the [gnolls](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barnabus), either to break free or continue being subservient.

title: 别担心，我有许可（Not to Worry, I Have a Permit）
description: 在与月出的囚犯们说话时避免出现不良后果。（Evade repercussions when speaking to the Moonrise prisoners.）
wiki_description:
Evade repercussions when speaking to the Moonrise prisoners.

- This can be achieved by either convincing the guards to let the party talk to the prisoners, by talking to the prisoners unobserved, or by killing all the guards and then talking to a prisoner.

title: 魔鬼藏在细节中（The Devil's in the Details）
description: 揭露出血甲魔与拉斐尔的契约中一个半真半假的内容。（Expose a half-truth in the orthon's contract with Raphael.）
wiki_description:
Expose a half-truth in the [orthon's contract](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gauntlet_of_Shar#Yurgir's_Tribulation) with [Raphael](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Raphael).

- Requires the interacting party member to succeed a passive  DC 14 [Insight](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Insight) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) in the initial dialogue with Yurgir to detect a tricky clause in the text of the contract. [Bards](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bard) and [Warlocks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Warlock) pass the check automatically.

- Shared with the ⁠[Killer Poetry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Killer_Poetry) inspiration.

title: 同类相知（Takes One to Know One）
description: 除掉收费员的所有金甲，揭露她的真面目。（Expose the true form of the toll collector by removing all her gold armour.）
wiki_description:
Expose the true form of the [toll collector](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm) by removing all her gold armour.

- This requires killing all her [minions](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Grim_Visage) in combat.

title: 知汝之客（Know thy Clientele）
description: 怂恿泽'瑞尔炫耀她从至上真神处得到的赠礼。（Instigate Z'rell into showing off her gifts from the Absolute.）
wiki_description: Instigate Z'rell into showing off her gifts from the Absolute.

title: 光明磊落（Clear Conscience）
description: 成功向泽'瑞尔谎报地精们的结局。（Successfully lie to Z'rell about the fate of the goblins.）
wiki_description: Successfully lie to [Z'rell](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Z%27rell) about the fate of the goblins.

title: 永远相信不诚实的人（Always Trust a Dishonest Person）
description: 背叛一个最近结成的联盟。（Betray a recently forged alliance.）
wiki_description:
Expose [Marcus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) to the Harpers.

- Only available if Tieflings weren't saved -- if Mol is alive she will vouch for the party instead of Marcus.

title: 我的事迹被大大地夸张了（The News of My Deeds Was Greatly Exaggerated）
description: 对博德之口公报的印刷机做手脚。（Rig the Baldur's Mouth printing press.）
wiki_description:
Rig the Baldur's Mouth printing press.

- Complete the quest [Stop the Presses](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses).

title: 行业之便（Perks of the Trade）
description: 在精灵之歌酒馆获得房间的折扣。（Obtain a rebate for your room at the Elfsong Tavern.）
wiki_description:
Obtain a rebate for your room at the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

- Trying to persuade [Alan Alyth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alan_Alyth) to give a discount by appealing to the murder does not grant this inspiration. Using any other ability checks, including class-based options, do grant it.

title: 诚者勿信（Never Trust an Honest Person）
description: 以欺骗的方式一路进入大谷仓。（Lie to make your way into the big barn.）
wiki_description: Lie to make your way into the [big barn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Requisitioned_Barn).

title: 巧舌胜过钥匙（Silver-Tongue's Better Than Any Key）
description: 获得进入艾弗里的工坊的方法。（Gain access to Avery's workshop.）
wiki_description:
Gain access to Avery's [workshop](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Felogyr%27s_Fireworks#First_floor).

- The party can either sneak in or gain access with the password obtained during [Investigate the Suspicious Toys](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_the_Suspicious_Toys).

title: 骗子反被骗（Cheating the Cheater）
description: 找到那个巨灵的把戏的源头并拿走。（Find the source of the genie's trick and take it.）
wiki_description:
Find the source of the [genie's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Circus_of_the_Last_Days) trick and take it.

- Pickpocket the [Djinni Ring](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Djinni_Ring) from [Akabi](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Akabi) and then win the jackpot. The inspiration is granted after Akabi awards you the "prize".

- Shared with ⁠[A Grand Prize!](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#A_Grand_Prize!).

title: 壁橱里的毛绒熊（Stuffed Bears in the Closet）
description: 勒索商人。（Blackmail the merchant.）
wiki_description: Blackmail the [merchant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio).

title: 薰衣草和百里香之隙（Seams of Lavender and Thyme）
description: 以欺骗的方式一路进入马戏团。（Deceive your way into the circus.）
wiki_description:
Deceive your way into the [circus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Circus_of_the_Last_Days).

- The inspiration cannot be gained if the party have already entered the circus' territory through an alternative route (e.g., from the [Open Hand Temple](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Open_Hand_Temple)). In this case, the gatekeeper [Klaus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Klaus) behaves as if they have already convinced him.

title: 万物皆有价（Nothing's Not for Sale）
description: 说服焰拳军需官跟你交易。（Convince the Flaming Fist quartermaster to trade with you.）
wiki_description: Convince the [Flaming Fist quartermaster](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arkleia_Oloril) to trade with you.

title: 探墓者（Grave Prospector）
description: 从巴格辛博那里取回坟墓的金子。（Retrieve the grave's gold from Bugthimble.）
wiki_description: Retrieve the grave's gold from [Bugthimble](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bugthimble).

title: 守信之女（Woman of Her Word）
description: 站在九指一边，对付散塔林会。（Side with the Nine-Fingers against the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description:
Side with the [Nine-Fingers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nine-Fingers) against the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim).

- At the conclusion of [Aid the Underduke](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aid_the_Underduke), support Nine-Fingers.

title: 金色翼蛇（Winged Serpent of Gold）
description: 站在散塔林会一边，对付九指。（Side with the Zhentarim against Nine-Fingers.）
wiki_description:
Side with the Zhentarim against Nine-Fingers.

- At the conclusion of Aid the Underduke, support the Zhentarim.

- [Roah Moonglow](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Roah_Moonglow) or [Friol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Friol) must survive and escape to the Guildhall in the [previous stage](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Abandoned_Cistern) of the [quest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Return_Rakath%27s_Gold).

title: 也没那么绝对可靠（Not so Infallible After All）
description: 避免被钢铁卫士抓捕。（Evade being arrested by a Steel Watcher.）
wiki_description: Evade being arrested by a [Steel Watcher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/South_Span_Checkpoint).

title: 低处的朋友（Friends in Low Places）
description: 通过图斯格朗特获得进入下层地下室的方法。（Gain access to the Undercellar through Tusgront.）
wiki_description: Gain access to the [Undercellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guildhall) through [Tusgront](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Tusgront).

title: 拯救同僚（Saving a Fellow Tale-Spinner）
description: 拯救瓦罗，避免他过早死去。（Save Volo from an untimely death.）
wiki_description:
Save [Volo](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Volo) from an untimely death.

- Rescue Volo from the angry mob in front of the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 有理有据（Rock-Solid Alibi）
description: 设法说服焰拳让你进入飞龙岩要塞。（Manage to convince the Flaming Fist to let you into Wyrm's Rock.）
wiki_description: Manage to convince the [Flaming Fist](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elin) to let you into Wyrm's Rock.

title: 金钱的诱惑（The Allure of Coin）
description: 从被鸟妖魅惑的孩子身上偷东西。（Steal from a child charmed by harpies.）
wiki_description:
Steal from [a child](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mirkon) charmed by harpies. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Protector of the Small](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Protector_of_the_Small) and mutually exclusive with ⁠[Slaying the Piper](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Slaying_the_Piper).

- This is only possible if the interacting party member is a  [Rogue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rogue).

title: 金腰带（Slaughter's Prize）
description: 与明萨拉合伙对林地烧杀掳掠。（Ally with Minthara to loot and slaughter the grove.）
wiki_description: Ally with [Minthara](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Minthara) to loot and slaughter the grove. This is mutually exclusive with ⁠[Guardian of the Forgotten](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Guardian_of_the_Forgotten) and ⁠[A Headless Horde](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#A_Headless_Horde).

title: 蛇首悬赏（Serpent's Bounty）
description: 收下赛夫洛对你杀死卡哈的奖赏。（Take Zevlor's payment for killing Kagha.）
wiki_description: Take [Zevlor's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zevlor) payment for killing [Kagha](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kagha).

title: 两恶取其轻（Lesser Evils）
description: 抢劫被奴役的渔民。（Rob the enthralled fishermen.）

title: 大秤分金（Perfect Cut）
description: 和灰矮人变节者分了尼讷的钱。（Split Nere's money with the duergar mutineers.）
wiki_description: Split [Nere's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nere) money with the [duergar mutineers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Free_True_Soul_Nere).

title: 剔除弱者（Culling the Crowd）
description: 毒杀营地中的醉酒地精。（Use poison to kill the drunk goblins in camp.）
wiki_description:
Use poison to [kill](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp#Booze_Tub) the drunk goblins in camp.

- Shared with ⁠[Spiked](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Spiked) and ⁠[Now It's a Party!](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Now_It's_a_Party!).

title: 越狱（Jailbreaker）
description: 护送萨扎离开林地。（Smuggle Sazza out of the grove.）
wiki_description: Smuggle [Sazza](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sazza) out of the grove.[[1]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-1)

title: 顺手牵羊（Swiftly Stolen）
description: 通过卑劣的手段获得飒拉的魔法靴子。（Obtain Thulla's magical boots through underhanded means.）
wiki_description: Obtain [Thulla's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thulla) [magical boots](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Boots_of_Speed) through underhanded means.

title: 开启有喜（Open for a Surprise）
description: 从散塔林会那里拿到铁烧瓶。（Acquire the Iron Flask from the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description:
Acquire the [Iron Flask](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Iron_Flask) from the Zhentarim.

- The party can pickpocket, knock out, or kill [Zarys](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zarys) for the [Caravan Strongbox](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Caravan_Strongbox) even after delivering it to her. If left with Zarys, it can instead be stolen or looted from [Slick Inatra](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Slick_Inatra) in Act Three.

title: 异端（Heretic）
description: 窃取西凡那斯神像。（Steal the Idol of Silvanus.）
wiki_description: Steal the [Idol of Silvanus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Idol_of_Silvanus). This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Idolatry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Idolatry).

title: 行家出手（Show Them How It's Done）
description: 从提夫林儿童的赃物堆中顺手牵羊并不使其敌对。（Steal from the tiefling children's stash without making enemies of them.）
wiki_description: Steal from the [tiefling children's stash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Tiefling_Hideout#Interactions) without making enemies of them.

title: 家族盟友（Friend of the Family）
description: 成为散塔林会的盟友。（Become an ally of the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description:
Become an ally of the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim).

- The party must pickup or steal the [Caravan Strongbox](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Caravan_Strongbox) without opening it and deliver it to [Zarys](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zarys). This is earned after delivering.

title: 至上赏赐（An Absolute Douceur）
description: 接受至上真神赠礼的承诺。（Accept the Absolute's promise of gifts.）
wiki_description:
Accept the Absolute's promise of gifts.

- Can be triggered by cooperating with [Marcus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) to abduct [Isobel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel_Thorm) from [Last Light Inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn).

title: 外行的笔记（Notes of an Amateur）
description: 制作特制穿肠散（Craft some Brewed-Up Bellyglummer.）
wiki_description: Craft some [Brewed-Up Bellyglummer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald%27s_Brewed-Up_Bellyglummer).

title: 盼望已久的重逢（Long-Awaited Reunion）
description: 将伊索贝尔交给凯瑟里克。（Hand Isobel over to Ketheric.）
wiki_description: Hand Isobel over to [Ketheric Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric_Thorm).

title: 闪亮饰品和小玩意（Shiny Trinkets and Baubles）
description: 拿走蛛化精灵的月亮提灯。（Take the drider's Moonlantern.）
wiki_description: Take [the drider's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kar%27niss) Moonlantern.

title: 逃脱匠人（Escape Artisan）
description: 把乌尔布伦的工具交给他，以便帮侏儒们逃走。（Give Wulbren his tools so the gnomes can escape.）
wiki_description: Give [Wulbren](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren_Bongle) his tools so the gnomes can escape.

title: 开始怀旧（Enter Nostalgia）
description: 闯入凯瑟里克和伊索贝尔各自的房间。（Trespass into Ketheric and Isobel's respective rooms.）
wiki_description: Trespass into Ketheric and Isobel's respective [rooms](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers#First_floor).

title: 身体盗窃（Body Heist）
description: 打开并搜刮夺心魔殖民地的宝库。（Open and loot the mind flayer colony's vault.）
wiki_description: Open and loot the [mind flayer colony's vault](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mind_Flayer_Colony#Necrotic_Laboratory).

title: 总有出路（Always a Way Out）
description: 帮助月出的囚犯逃离。（Help the Moonrise prisoners escape.）
wiki_description: Help the [Moonrise prisoners](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rescue_the_Tieflings) escape.

title: 战争投机者（War Profiteer）
description: 在月出找到罗阿并与她交易。（Find Roah in Moonrise and trade with her.）
wiki_description: Find [Roah](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Roah_Moonglow) in [Moonrise](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers) and trade with her.

title: 你的就是我的（What's Yours is Mine）
description: 在不协助或杀死血甲魔的情况下拿走莎尔的宝石。（Take Shar's gem without aiding or killing the orthon.）
wiki_description:
Take [Shar's gem](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Umbral_Gem) without aiding or killing [the orthon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir).

- The party must use [Greater Invisibility](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Greater_Invisibility) or similar to sneak in and pick up the Gem. Stealing the Gem makes Yurgir and his allies permanently hostile.

title: 选择合适的工具（Right Tool for the Job）
description: 获得护士工具的全部4种变体。（Obtain all 4 variants of the nurses' tools.）
wiki_description:
Obtain all 4 variants of the [nurses'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zealous_Assistant) tools.

- Loot the Uncommon variants of the [Syringe](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Syringe_(%2B1)), [Bonesaw](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bonesaw_(%2B1)), [Artificial Leech](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Artificial_Leech_(%2B1)), and [Trepan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Trepan_(%2B1)).

title: 黑暗边缘（A Dark Edge）
description: 从仪式基座拿走莎尔的匕首。（Take Shar's dagger from the ritual pedestal.）
wiki_description:
Take Shar's [dagger](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ritual_Dagger_of_Shar) from the ritual pedestal.

- The pedestal is found in the [Sharran Sanctuary](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharran_Sanctuary), and taking the dagger spawns several enemies.

title: 个人工资（Personal Payroll）
description: 发现收费员的私人宝藏。（Discover the Toll Collector's personal hoard.）
wiki_description: Discover the [Toll Collector's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm) personal hoard at X: -125 Y: -90.

title: 善变的忠诚（Fickle Allegiances）
description: 在获知暗夜之歌并不是件圣物之后，背叛巴萨扎尔。（Betray Balthazar after learning that Nightsong is not a simple relic.）
wiki_description: Betray [Balthazar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar) after learning that Nightsong is not a simple relic.

title: 下一代口袋（Next Generation of Pockets）
description: 在德兹的教养过程中扮演一个有贡献的角色。（Assume a contributive role in Dez's parenting.）
wiki_description:
Assume a contributive role in Dez's parenting.

- The party must suggest to [Dez Kanshaw](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dez_Kanshaw) at the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern) that his son should join the [Guild](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild). The option to do this is only available to [Rogue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rogue) characters.

title: 紧迫的盗窃（A Pressing Heist）
description: 对博德之口公报的印刷机做手脚。（Rig the Baldur's Mouth printing press.）
wiki_description: [Rig](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses) the Baldur's Mouth printing press.

title: "免费"捐赠（Donations Means 'Free'）
description: 从大谷仓里偷取捐赠物品。（Steal donated goods from the big barn.）
wiki_description:
Steal donated goods from the [big barn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Requisitioned_Barn).

- Specifically, loot the Donations chest at X: 76 Y: -111

title: 自由的代价（Price of Freedom）
description: 让阿尔弗见识资本主义的微妙之处。（Introduce Arfur to the subtleties of capitalism.）
wiki_description: Introduce [Arfur](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio) to the subtleties of capitalism.

title: 错误判决（Wrongly Convicted）
description: 将顾问弗洛瑞克救出飞龙岩要塞。（Break Counsellor Florrick out of Wyrm's Rock.）
wiki_description:
Break [Counsellor Florrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Counsellor_Florrick) out of Wyrm's Rock.

- Shared with the ⁠[Diplomatic Rescue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Diplomatic_Rescue).

title: 跨位面猫盗（Interplanar Cat Burglar）
description: 进入希望之邸盗窃并逃出去。（Burgle and escape the House of Hope.）
wiki_description: Burgle and escape the [House of Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Hope).

title: 忠诚有价（Buyable Loyalty）
description: 拿地底侏儒首领的脑袋换取赏金。（Get your payday for the head of the deep gnome's leader.）
wiki_description: Get your payday for the head of the [deep gnome's leader](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Deal_with_the_Gnomes).

title: 回到熟悉环境（Back into the Familiar）
description: 找到进入下层地下室的方法。（Gain a way into the Undercellar.）
wiki_description:
Gain a way into the [Undercellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guildhall).

- Shared with the ⁠[Beneath the Gate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#Beneath_the_Gate), ⁠[Home Sweet Home](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Home_Sweet_Home), and ⁠[Underbelly Diplomat](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Underbelly_Diplomat) inspirations.

title: 供给与需求（Supply and Demand）
description: 提出只收比利文顿老鼠更低的费用，就把非法侵占的人赶走。（Offer to kick the squatters out for a lower fee than the Rivington Rats.）
wiki_description: Offer to kick the [squatters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ben_Golewits) out for a lower fee than the Rivington Rats.

title: 轻而易举（Easy Pickings）
description: 在卡利欧斯和他的手下与法尔林一行战斗后，再将卡利欧斯他们干掉。（Take out Caïros and his crew after they fight with Farlin's crew.）
wiki_description:
Take out [Caïros](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ca%C3%AFros) and his crew after they fight with [Farlin's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Farlin) crew.

- Mutually exclusive with Stacking the Deck and shared with ⁠[Cleaning up the Scum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Cleaning_up_the_Scum).

title: 看看这是什么？（What Do We Have Here?）
description: 打开清账屋下层的其中一个额外保险库。（Open one of the additional vaults in the lower levels of the Counting House.）
wiki_description:
Open one of the additional vaults in the lower levels of the [Counting House](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Counting_House).

- Must be opened via lockpicking.

title: 宝库钥匙（Key to the Vault）
description: 获得进入下层保险库的方法。（Obtain a way to enter the lower vaults.）
wiki_description: [Obtain a way](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Counting_House#Obtaining_a_Bank_Pass) to enter the lower vaults.

title: 总有后门（There's Always a Back Door）
description: 获得进入慈爱神殿隐藏门的方法。（Gain access to the Open Hand Temple's hidden door.）
wiki_description:
Gain access to the Open Hand Temple's hidden door.

- Open the movable wall section in the [Open Hand Temple Underground Area](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Open_Hand_Temple_Underground_Area) from the either side.

title: 盗亦有道（Honour Among Thieves）
description: 站在九指一边，对付散塔林会。（Side with Nine-Fingers against the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description:
Side with [Nine-Fingers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nine-Fingers_Keene) against the Zhentarim.

- Shared with the ⁠[Woman of Her Word](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Woman_of_Her_Word).

title: 生意而已（It's Just Business）
description: 站在散塔林会一边，对付九指。（Side with the Zhentarim against Nine-Fingers.）
wiki_description:
Side with the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim) against Nine-Fingers.

- Shared with the ⁠[Winged Serpent of Gold](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Winged_Serpent_of_Gold).

title: 暗耍花招（Stacking the Deck）
description: 站在法尔林和公会一般，对抗石头领主的走私者。（Side with Farlin and the Guild against the Stonelord's smugglers.）
wiki_description:
Side with [Farlin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Farlin) and [The Guild](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Guild) against the [Stonelord's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Stone_Lord) smugglers.

- Mutually exclusive with Easy Pickings.

title: 帮它免于吃灰（Saving It From Collecting Dust）
description: 偷取献给神的祭品。（Steal an offering to the gods.）
wiki_description:
Steal an [offering to the gods](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stormshore_Tabernacle#Tabernacle_Basement).

- Shared with the ⁠[Weak Gifts for Weak Beings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Weak_Gifts_for_Weak_Beings).

title: 逃脱专家（Escape Artist）
description: 在被捕后逃狱。（Escape from jail after being arrested.）
wiki_description: Escape from jail after being arrested.

title: 血债（Blood Price）
description: 谋杀一位无辜民众。（Murder an innocent civilian.）
wiki_description:
Murder an innocent civilian.

- Specifically, kill someone who isn't hostile at the time you attack them.

title: 好宝贝（A Fine Fortune）
description: 偷窃一个至少价值1000金币的物品。（Steal an item worth at least 1000 gold.）
wiki_description: Steal an item worth at least 1000 gold.

title: 灵光一闪（A Bard's Muse）
description: 给吟游诗人阿尔菲拉带去灵感。（Inspire Alfira the bard.）
wiki_description: Inspire [Alfira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alfira) the bard.

title: 创造者之心（Heart of the Creator）
description: 与机器人伯纳德一起演出。（Perform in a play with Bernard the automaton.）
wiki_description:
Perform in a play with [Bernard](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bernard) the automaton.

- Choose any of the dialogue options granted by reading the various books throughout the [Arcane Tower](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arcane_Tower).

title: 庆典（Celebrant）
description: 在营地里与提夫林共舞。（Enjoy a dance in camp with the tieflings.）
wiki_description:
Enjoy a dance in camp with the [tieflings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rescue_the_Druid_Halsin#Claiming_the_Rewards).

- Dance with [Zae](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zae), a Tiefling who only appears if [Lakrissa](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lakrissa) has been killed or knocked out.

title: 追鸡高手（Chicken Chase Extraordinaire）
description: 赢得一局追鸡游戏。（Win a match of chicken chase.）
wiki_description:
Win a match of chicken chase.

- Can be won fairly, using [Command: Approach](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Command:_Approach), or with [Speak with Animals](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Speak_with_Animals) using persuasion to guide the creature to the post.

title: 都来瞧都来看（Give Them a Show）
description: 与粉碎机对决时获得地精们的支持。（Get the goblins on your side while duelling Crusher.）
wiki_description:
Get the goblins on your side while duelling [Crusher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crusher).

- Defeat [Crusher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Novice_Crusher) in a duel and, after he surrenders, choose the Intimidate option to make him kiss your foot.

- Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Anything for a Profit](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Anything_for_a_Profit) and ⁠[What Price Dignity?](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#What_Price_Dignity?)

title: 痛苦的艺术（The Art of Agony）
description: 在劳薇塔的仪式中为她表演。（Perform for Loviatar's pleasure in her ritual.）
wiki_description: Perform for [Loviatar's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Loviatar) pleasure in her [ritual](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bloodied_Shrine).

title: 微不足道（The Price of Ink）
description: 从散塔林会手中救出画家奥斯卡。（Free Oskar the painter from the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description: Free [Oskar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar) the painter from the Zhentarim.

title: 传奇故事（A Story for the Ages）
description: 以一个恰到好处的故事让某人倒戈。（Turn someone to your side with a well-timed tale.）
wiki_description:
Turn someone to your side with a well-timed tale.

- Convince [Kagha](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kagha) to abandon the Shadow Druids.

- Alternatively, read the four Druid frescos in the room before confronting her.

title: 及时行乐（Life of the Party）
description: 在地精营地的庆祝中敬酒。（Take part in the goblin camp's toast.）
wiki_description: Take part in the [Goblin Camp's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp) toast.

title: 不看不行（Made You Look）
description: 取走马蒂斯的戒指以得到他的尊重。（Earn Mattis' respect by taking his ring.）
wiki_description:
Earn [Mattis'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mattis) respect by taking his ring. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Artful Dodger](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Artful_Dodger).

- The interacting party member must pass a  DC 15 [Sleight of Hand](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sleight_of_Hand) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) through dialogue to get both inspirations.

-  [Rogues](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rogue) have  [Advantage](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Advantage) and only need to pass a  DC 10 [Sleight of Hand](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sleight_of_Hand) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check).

title: 成名的代价（A Very Tall Tale）
description: 为瓦罗讲述一个适合记录在畅销读物里的戏剧性故事。（Tell Volo a dramatic story fit for a chapbook.）
wiki_description: Tell [Volo](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Volo) a dramatic story fit for a chapbook.

title: 感受节拍（Feel the Beat）
description: 成功的在地精战鼓上演奏。（Successfully perform on the goblin war drum.）
wiki_description:
Successfully perform on the goblin [war drum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp#War_Drum).

- This cutscene triggers only when interacting with the war drum near the main entrance of the camp.[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)]

title: 两个灵魂的故事（A Tale of Two Souls）
description: 完成阿尔特、哈尔辛以及大地之灵的传奇故事。（Complete the saga of Art, Halsin, and the spirit of the land.）
wiki_description: Complete the [saga](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lift_the_Shadow_Curse) of Art, Halsin and the spirit of the land.

title: 难以置信的故事（A Story You Won't Believe）
description: 在向酿酒师吹牛时通过所有的表演检定。（Pass all Performance checks when telling a tall tale to the brewer.）
wiki_description: Pass all [Performance](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Performance) [checks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) when telling a tall tale to [the brewer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm).

title: 往昔传说（Tales of Yore）
description: 正确拼凑雕文，揭示城镇广场上的秘密。（Piece the scriptures together correctly and reveal the secret in the town square.）
wiki_description: Piece the scriptures together correctly and reveal the secret in the town square.

title: 拨动里拉琴的网（Plucking the Lyre's Web）
description: 演奏蜘蛛的里拉琴以吸引蛛化精灵。（Play the Spider's Lyre to attract the drider.）
wiki_description: Play the [Spider's Lyre](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Spider%27s_Lyre) to attract the drider.

title: 死亡象征（Memento Mori）
description: 向竖琴手梅根表达哀悼。（Offer condolences to Harper Meygan.）
wiki_description:
Offer condolences to [Meygan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Meygan).

- Talk to Meygan while she's mourning [Yonas](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yonas) at the fane at X: -61 Y: 112.

- Obtainable only before [Marcus'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) attempt to kidnap [Isobel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel).

- Shared with ⁠[Tragic Love](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Tragic_Love).

title: 活着的传奇（Living Legend）
description: 接受贾希拉的谈话邀请。（Accept Jaheira's invitation to talk.）
wiki_description: Accept [Jaheira's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Jaheira) invitation to talk.

title: 心之蚀（Eclipse of the Heart）
description: 向凯瑟里克讲述他的过去，动摇他的决心。（Recount Ketheric's past to him, shaking his resolve.）
wiki_description: Recount [Ketheric Thorm's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric_Thorm) past to him, shaking his resolve.

title: 朗朗上口（Catchy Tune）
description: 听取血甲魔的契约。（Hear the orthon's contract.）
wiki_description: Hear the [orthon's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir) contract.

title: 命运的丝线（Strings of Fate）
description: 把阿尔特的鲁特琴带给他。（Bring Art his lute.）
wiki_description: Bring [Art](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Art_Cullagh) his lute.

title: 死亡之舞（Danse Macabre）
description: 让豺狼人继续受其主人的影响。（Make the gnolls stay under the influence of their master.）
wiki_description: Make the [gnolls](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/%27Barnabus%27) stay under the influence of [their master](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Linsella).

title: 另一种灵感（A Different Kind of Muse）
description: 与月出的奇怪意识建立连接。（Connect to the strange consciousness in Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Connect to the [strange consciousness](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cracked_wall) in Moonrise.

title: 它来自阴影（It Came From Shadows）
description: 找出幽影诅咒的根源。（Discover the source of the shadow curse.）
wiki_description: Discover the source of the Shadow Curse.

title: 幽影之镇（Town of Shadows）
description: 了解镇上每个主要人物的命运：酿酒师、外科医生、收费员和石匠。（Find out the fate of each of the major characters in the town: the brewer, the surgeon, the toll collector, and the mason.）
wiki_description:
Find out the fate of each of the major characters in the town: [the brewer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Waning_Moon), [the surgeon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Healing), [the toll collector](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Reithwin_Tollhouse) and [the mason](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mason%27s_Guild_Basement).

- Talk to [Thisobald Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm), [Malus Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Gerringothe Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm). Also, read the plaque in the [Mason's Guild](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mason%27s_Guild).

title: 成为焦点（Taking the Spotlight）
description: 自愿走上马戏团的舞台。（Willingly step up to the circus' stage.）
wiki_description: Willingly step up to the [circus'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Circus_of_the_Last_Days) stage.

title: 按我的曲调来（Making It Sing to Your Tune）
description: 破坏印刷机。（Sabotage the printing press.）
wiki_description: [Sabotage](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses) the printing press.

title: 喋喋不休（Blabbermouth）
description: 完成朗斯的采访。（Complete Lens' interview.）
wiki_description: Complete [Lens'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lens) interview.

title: 寻找她的舞台（Finding her Stage）
description: 在博德之门与阿尔菲拉重聚。（Reunite with Alfira in Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description: Reunite with [Alfira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alfira) in [Baldur's Gate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

title: 大城市里的外星人（Alien in the Big City）
description: 遇见普塔瑞斯并与其熟识。（Meet and acquaint yourself with Ptaris.）
wiki_description: Meet and acquaint yourself with [Ptaris](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ptaris).

title: 个人邀请（Personal Invitation）
description: 见证戈塔什的加冕。（Witness Gortash's coronation.）
wiki_description:
Witness [Gortash's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gortash) coronation.

- Shared with ⁠[Coronation of the Dreadmaster](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#Coronation_of_the_Dreadmaster).

title: 诗人之歌（Skald's Song）
description: 见证古尔葬礼。（Witness the Gur funeral.）
wiki_description:
Witness the [Gur](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gur) funeral.

- Shared with ⁠[Solemn Farewell](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#Solemn_Farewell).

title: 至少他们没有扔烂香蕉...（At Least They Didn't Throw Overripe Bananas...）
description: 在喜剧比赛中输掉。（Lose the comedy contest.）
wiki_description: Lose the comedy contest in the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern#Laff_Riot).

title: 演绎淑妮（Playing Sune）
description: 劝说斯文接受希格的提议。（Nudge Svend to accept Siggy's proposition.）
wiki_description:
Nudge [Svend](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Svend) to accept Siggy's proposition.

- These people can be found at [The Blushing Mermaid](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Blushing_Mermaid).

title: 名声之线（Threads of Fame）
description: 从著名的费加罗那里获得一件衣服。（Obtain a piece of clothing from the famous Figaro.）
wiki_description:
Obtain a piece of clothing from the famous [Figaro](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Figaro_Pennygood).

- Granted only upon trading with Figaro Pennygood himself. Trading with [Phlanders Hort](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Phlanders_Hort) if Figaro died does not count.

title: 爱的苦痛（The Throes of Love）
description: 救奥斯卡的命。（Save Oskar's life.）
wiki_description: Save [Oskar's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar_Fevras) life.

title: 当代恶徒（Villain of the Ages）
description: 遭遇沙洛佛克，黑暗之神巴尔的邪恶后裔（Encounter Sarevok, wretched spawn of the dark God Bhaal）
wiki_description: Encounter [Sarevok](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sarevok_Anchev), wretched spawn of the dark God [Bhaal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bhaal).

title: 私人演出（Giving a Private Performance）
description: 接受夏芮丝的爱抚的其中一个报价。（Accept one of the offers at Sharess' Caress.）
wiki_description:
Receive a service at Sharess' Caress.

- Accept a free drink from [Hoots Hooligan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hoots_Hooligan)

- Experience 'rapture' from [Naoise Nallinto](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Naoise_Nallinto)

- Hire either [Nym Orlith](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nym_Orlith) or [Sorn Orlith](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sorn_Orlith) or both

- Shared with ⁠[Alternative Vocations](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild_Artisan#Alternative_Vocations).

title: 戏剧侦探（Drama Sleuth）
description: 继续瓦莱里亚的调查。（Take up Valeria's investigation.）
wiki_description: Take up [Valeria's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria) investigation.

title: 海上纪念式（Sea Memorial）
description: 在水女王的葬礼上献上一些东西。（Offer something during the Water Queen's funeral procession.）
wiki_description: Offer something during the [Water Queen's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Water_Queen%27s_House) funeral procession.

title: 正直冒险者（A Stand-Up Adventurer）
description: 在喜剧比赛中获胜。（Win the comedy contest.）
wiki_description: Win the comedy contest in the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern#Laff_Riot).

title: 爆裂艺术（Explosive Artistry）
description: 从乌尔布伦处获得符文火药炸弹。（Obtain the runepowder bomb from Wulbren.）
wiki_description: Obtain the [Runepowder Bomb](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Runepowder_Bomb) from [Wulbren](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren).

title: 及时营救（A Timely Rescue）
description: 从地精绑架者手中救出芬德尔。（Save Findal from the goblins who kidnapped him.）
wiki_description: Save [Findal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Findal) from the goblins who kidnapped him.

title: 命悬一线（Saved by a Thread）
description: 不让斯密辛摔死。（Save Smythin from his lethal fall.）
wiki_description:
Save [Smythin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Smythin) from his lethal fall.

- There is a very tight timing as he is pushed down shortly after any party member reaches the top of stairs X: 305 Y: 0 or X: 288 Y: 0.

- If [Sazza](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sazza) is escorted out the grove before the party reaches this point, Smythin does not appear.

title: 揭开真相（Unmasking the Truth）
description: 让鬼婆的一个面具奴隶重获自由。（Free one of the Hag's masked thralls.）
wiki_description: Free the [Mask of Regret](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mask_of_Regret_(Overgrown_Tunnel)), one of the Hag's masked thralls

title: 儿童保护者（Protector of the Small）
description: 从鸟妖手中救下米尔克。（Save Mirkon from the harpies.）
wiki_description:
Save [Mirkon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mirkon) from the harpies.

- Shared with ⁠[The Allure of Coin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#The_Allure_of_Coin) and ⁠[Slaying the Piper](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Slaying_the_Piper).

title: 扫雷（A Lethal Endeavour）
description: 护送巴伦离开噼啪砰区域。（Escort Baelen out of the field of bibberbangs.）
wiki_description: Escort [Baelen](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Baelen) out of the field of bibberbangs.

title: 火场救星（Rescued from the Flames）
description: 从渥金的休眠地尽量救人。（Save whoever you can from Waukeen's Rest.）
wiki_description:
Save whoever you can from [Waukeen's Rest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Waukeen%27s_Rest).

- Despite the description, saving either [Florrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Florrick) or [Benryn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Benryn) grants it, even if the other one is still alive and blocked inside.

title: 碎镣者（Breaker of Chains）
description: 从尼讷和灰矮人手中解救地底侏儒。（Save the deep gnomes from Nere and the duergar.）
wiki_description: Save the deep gnomes from [Nere](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nere) and the [duergar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Save_the_Grymforge_Gnomes).

title: 被遗忘者的守护者（Guardian of the Forgotten）
description: 在地精袭击中保护提夫林。（Save the tieflings from the goblin assault.）
wiki_description:
Save the tieflings from the goblin assault.

- The party must defend the grove when [Minthara's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Minthara) forces assault the grove.

- Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Slaughter's Prize](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Slaughter's_Prize) and ⁠[A Headless Horde](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#A_Headless_Horde).

title: 蛇语者（Snake Whisperer）
description: 从卡哈和她的毒蛇手中保护阿拉贝尔。（Protect Arabella from Kagha and her serpent.）
wiki_description:
Save [Arabella](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arabella) from [Kagha](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kagha) and her serpent.

- The party must complete the quest by speaking to Arabella and her parents to get the inspiration

title: 解放者（Liberator）
description: 解放被夺心魔奴役的渔夫。（Liberate the enthralled fishermen from the mind flayer.）

title: 生不如死（Fate Worse Than Death）
description: 从地精折磨者手中救出利亚姆。（Save Liam from his goblin torturers.）
wiki_description: Save [Liam](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Liam) from his goblin torturers.

title: 世界上最不幸的侏儒（The Most Unfortunate Gnome）
description: 从风车上救下侏儒。（Rescue the gnome from his fate at the windmill.）
wiki_description: Rescue [the gnome](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barcus_Wroot) from his fate at the windmill. This is earned after speaking to him.

title: 九命诗人（The Bard with Nine Lives）
description: 在地精营地解救瓦罗。（Rescue Volo from the goblin camp.）
wiki_description:
Rescue [Volo](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Volo) from the [Goblin Camp](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp).

- The inspiration is granted in the camp, if Volo was sent there after saving him.

title: 英雄惜英雄（From One Hero to Another）
description: 遇见贾希拉并给她留下好印象。（Meet Jaheira and stay in her good books.）
wiki_description: Meet [Jaheira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Jaheira) and drink the wine she offers.

title: 权力导致腐败，绝对的...（Power Corrupts... Absolutely）
description: 击败腐败小镇中的所有主要角色。（Defeat all of the major figures in the corrupted town.）
wiki_description:
Defeat all of the major figures in the corrupted town.

- The party must defeat [Gerringothe Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Thisobald Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm). All three must be defeated in combat.

title: 不寻常的认可（Uncommon Recognition）
description: 向熊地精商人讲述你的功绩。（Relate your feats to the bugbear merchant.）
wiki_description: Relate your feats to the [bugbear merchant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lann_Tarv).

title: 伟大降临其上（Greatness Thrust Upon Them）
description: 找到阿拉贝尔并将其救回你的营地。（Find, save, and bring Arabella to your camp.）
wiki_description: Find, save & bring [Arabella](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arabella) to your camp.

title: 不再是无助少女（Damsel No More）
description: 释放暗夜之歌。（Free Nightsong.）
wiki_description: Free [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin).

title: 帮助小家伙（Helping the Little Guy）
description: 帮助摩尔下赢枪板棋。（Help Mol win the game of lanceboard.）
wiki_description: Help [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) win the game of lanceboard.

title: 微笑更合适...（A Smile Better Suits...）
description: 对阿尔菲拉的询问给出充满希望的答复。（Offer a hopeful response to Alfira's inquiry.）
wiki_description: Offer a hopeful response to [Alfira's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alfira) inquiry.

title: 摆脱所有束缚（No Strings to Hold Them Back）
description: 把豺狼人从奴役中释放。（Release the gnolls from their enslavement.）
wiki_description: Release the [gnolls](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barnabus) from their enslavement.

title: 越狱！（Breakout!）
description: 救出月出所有的囚犯。（Break out and save all of the Moonrise prisoners.）
wiki_description: Break out and save all of the [Moonrise](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers) prisoners.

title: 一个不多（Not Another Soul）
description: 在与幽影的伏击战中确保所有竖琴手都活下来。（Keep all Harpers alive during the ambush with the Shadows.）
wiki_description: Keep all Harpers alive during the ambush with the Shadows.

title: 命运交会（Meeting of Fates）
description: 在终焉光芒的对峙中站在伊索贝尔或者马库斯那边。（Side with either Isobel or Marcus during the confrontation in Last Light.）
wiki_description: Side with either [Isobel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel_Thorm) or [Marcus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marcus_Falgor) during the confrontation in Last Light.

title: 拯救奇迹（Saving the Prodigious）
description: 在幽影诅咒之地救出罗兰。（Save Rolan from the Shadow-Cursed Lands.）
wiki_description: Save [Rolan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rolan) from the Shadow-Cursed Lands.

title: 权力腐败（Power Corrupts）
description: 击败腐败小镇中的一名主要角色。（Defeat a major figure in the corrupted town.）
wiki_description:
Defeat a major figure in the corrupted town.

- The party must defeat [Gerringothe Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), or [Thisobald Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm).

title: 不能脏手（Keeping Your Hands Clean）
description: 拒绝用乌尔布伦的计划造成间接伤害。（Refuse to cause collateral damage with Wulbren's plan.）
wiki_description: Refuse to cause collateral damage with [Wulbren's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Avenge_the_Ironhands) plan.

title: 外交救援（Diplomatic Rescue）
description: 将顾问弗洛瑞克从飞龙岩要塞救出（Save Counsellor Florrick from Wyrm's Rock.）
wiki_description: [Save Counsellor Florrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Free_Counsellor_Florrick) from Wyrm's Rock.

title: 守护鸣鸟（Safeguarding the Songbird）
description: 在博德之门见到不慌不忙的阿尔菲拉。（Meet the unflappable Alfira in Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description: Meet the unflappable [Alfira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alfira) in [Baldur's Gate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern#Roof).

title: 赌约不可违（A Bet Is a Bet）
description: 在博德之门见到拉克里萨。（Meet with Lakrissa in Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description:
Meet with [Lakrissa](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lakrissa) in [Baldur's Gate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

- Only obtained if the party talked with Lakrissa in the [Emerald Grove](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Emerald_Grove) and made a wager with her on reaching Baldur's Gate.

title: 失去的纯真（Innocence Lost）
description: 揭露玩具制造者的诡计。（Expose the toy-maker's mischief.）
wiki_description: Expose the [toy-maker's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio) mischief.

title: 释放猎物（Freeing the Preyed）
description: 将希望从囚禁中解救出来。（Free Hope from captivity.）
wiki_description: Free [Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hope) from captivity.

title: 不畏艰险（Against All Odds）
description: 救出所有被抓贡德信徒的家庭成员。（Rescue all the captured Gondians' family members.）
wiki_description: Rescue all thirteen captured Gondians' family members before the turn limit expires.

title: 屠龙者（Wyrmslayers）
description: 挑战并打败安苏，飞龙关绝非不朽的哨兵。（Challenge and defeat Ansur, the not-so-immortal sentinel of Wyrm's Crossing.）
wiki_description: Challenge and defeat [Ansur](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ansur), the not-so-immortal sentinel of Wyrm's Crossing.

title: 逝者共情（Empathy for the Fallen）
description: 说服棺材匠破例一次。（Convince the coffin-maker to make an exception.）
wiki_description: Convince the coffin-maker [Ulkov Sully](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ulkov_Sully) to make an exception.

title: 决不再被囚禁（Never To Be Chained Again）
description: 击败洛若坎并让暗夜之歌报她的仇。（Defeat Lorroakan and let Nightsong execute her vengeance.）
wiki_description: Defeat [Lorroakan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lorroakan) and let [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin) execute her vengeance.

title: 画出的英雄（Painted Hero）
description: 从奥斯卡处获取你的肖像画。（Obtain your portrait from Oskar.）
wiki_description: Obtain your portrait from [Oskar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Free_the_Artist).

title: 裁判所的终结（End of the Tribunal）
description: 拯救瓦莱里亚并结束谋杀裁决。（Save Valeria and end the Murder Tribunal.）
wiki_description: Save [Valeria](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria) and end the Murder Tribunal.

title: 被束缚的不幸灵魂（Chained, Unfortunate Souls）
description: 拯救卡扎多尔巢穴里的吸血鬼衍体。（Rescue the vampire spawn from Cazador's lair.）
wiki_description: Rescue the vampire spawn from [Cazador's lair](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cazador%27s_Dungeon).

title: 确保款待（Securing Hospitality）
description: 让占屋的难民免于被赶走。（Save the squatters from being kicked out.）
wiki_description: Save the [squatters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ben_Golewits) from being kicked out.

title: 真相照亮一切（Truth Shines Through）
description: 查出连环谋杀案的真凶。（Find the true culprit behind the serial murders.）
wiki_description: Find the [true culprit](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_the_Murders) behind the serial murders.

title: 相信你的本能（Trusting Your Instincts）
description: 继续瓦莱里亚草草了结的调查。（Take up Valeria's shoddily concluded investigation.）
wiki_description: Take up [Valeria's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria) shoddily concluded investigation.

title: 需要英雄（In Need of a Hero）
description: 成功将所有贡德信徒从钢铁卫士铸造厂救出。（Successfully rescue all the Gondians from the Steel Watch Foundry.）
wiki_description: Successfully rescue all of the Gondians from the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 艺术永存（Art Endures）
description: 用精金熔炉制造东西。（Craft something in the Adamantine Forge.）
wiki_description: Craft something in the Adamantine Forge.

title: 青出于蓝（The Apprentice Turns Master）
description: 在大埚中制作内蒂的解毒剂。（Craft Nettie's antidote in the cauldron.）

title: 垃圾还是宝藏（Trash & Treasure）
description: 观察平庸宝箱的效果。（Observe the effects of the Chest of the Mundane.）
wiki_description: Observe the effects of the [Chest of the Mundane](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Chest_of_the_Mundane).

title: 蜘蛛的恩赐（The Spider's Gift）
description: 认出渥金的休眠地附近的卓尔护甲。（Identify the drow armour near Waukeen's Rest.）
wiki_description:
Identify the [drow armour](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Faded_Drow_Leather_Armour) near [Waukeen's Rest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Waukeen%27s_Rest).

- This requires the armour to be picked up with a Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnome, or any character with +5 to [History](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/History) or higher in the party.

title: 专家意见（Expert Opinion）
description: 检查复仇之炉遗迹并与灰矮人石匠分享你的发现。（Evaluate the ruins in Grymforge and share your findings with the duergar mason.）
wiki_description:
Evaluate the ruins in Grymforge and share your findings with the [duergar mason](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kith).

- This is granted if all three checks ( [Investigation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigation),  [History](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/History) and  [Perception](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Perception), all DC 10) on examining ruins are passed by a single character. Any other party member starts an independent dialogue and has to pass their own sequence of checks.

- The checks are not necessary passed in a single dialogue; a party member can try them separately until they use the dialogue option "I'm ready to report".

title: 再生（Regeneration）
description: 恢复奥法高塔升降梯的能源供给。（Restore power to the elevator in the Arcane Tower.）
wiki_description: Restore power to the elevator in the [Arcane Tower](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arcane_Tower).

title: 特殊风味（An Acquired Taste）
description: 饮用埃赛尔婶婶的特殊药水。（Drink one of Auntie Ethel's unique potions.）
wiki_description:
Drink one of [Ethel's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Auntie_Ethel) unique potions.

- [Heart of Stone](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Heart_of_Stone) or [A Mother's Loathing](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/A_Mother%27s_Loathing) are recommended, as the others have negative effects.

title: 优选材料（The Finest Ingredients）
description: 使用轻语树皮制作一件大师级道具。（Create a masterwork item from sussur bark.）
wiki_description: Create a masterwork item from [Sussur Tree Bark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sussur_Tree_Bark).

title: 菇家寡人（Mind Over Mushrooms）
description: 为奥米伦的药水收集材料。（Gather ingredients for Omeluum's potion.）
wiki_description: Gather ingredients for [Omeluum's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Omeluum) potion.

title: 艺术家的求助（An Artist in Need）
description: 从散塔林会手中救出画家奥斯卡。（Rescue Oskar the painter from the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description: Rescue [Oskar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar) the painter from the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim).

title: 新视界（A New Vision）
description: 重铸断矛。（Reforge the broken spear.）
wiki_description: Reforge the [broken spear](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Vision_of_the_Absolute).

title: 定期维护（In Working Order）
description: 修理散塔林会藏身处的升降梯。（Repair the elevator in the Zhentarim hideout.）
wiki_description: Repair the elevator in the [Zhentarim Hideout](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim_Hideout).

title: 血汗药（Blood, Sweat, and the Other Thing）
description: 将你的血交给阿拉吉·欧布罗扎。（Give your blood to Araj Oblodra.）
wiki_description: Give your blood to [Araj Oblodra](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Araj_Oblodra).

title: 特制冰砒霜... 饮？（Special Iced Arsenic... Brew?）
description: 制作一些特制穿肠散。（Craft some Brewed-Up Bellyglummer.）
wiki_description: Craft some [Brewed-Up Bellyglummer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald%27s_Brewed-Up_Bellyglummer).

title: 在我掌心（In the Palm of My Hand）
description: 从巴克斯处获得精准报复。（Acquire the Brilliant Retort from Barcus.）
wiki_description:
Acquire the [Brilliant Retort](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brilliant_Retort) from [Barcus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barcus_Wroot).

- This is the reward for completing the quest [Rescue Wulbren](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rescue_Wulbren).

title: 交配季节（Mating Season）
description: 找出移位兽迷恋的源头。（Discover the source of the displacer beast's infatuation.）
wiki_description:
Discover the source of the [displacer beast's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nessa) infatuation.

- The party must investigate the spider carcass near [Yurgir](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir).

title: 不健康的豪饮（Safety-Averse Quaffing）
description: 至少喝1杯酿酒师的酒。（Drink at least 1 of the brewer's steins.）
wiki_description: Drink at least 1 of the [brewer's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm) steins.

title: 泥瓦的悲剧（Tragedy in Masonry）
description: 查清石匠的命运。（Discover the fate of the mason.）
wiki_description: Discover the fate of the mason.

title: 地狱武装（Hellish Armaments）
description: 从戴摩处获得一件地狱装备。（Obtain a piece of infernal equipment from Dammon.）
wiki_description: Obtain a piece of infernal equipment from [Dammon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dammon).

title: 信任以及一点皮克精尘（Trust and a Little Pixie Dust）
description: 调查月亮提灯并找出其力量来源。（Investigate the Moonlantern and find its power source.）
wiki_description: Investigate the Moonlantern and find its power source.

title: 无情技艺（Ruthless Craftsmanship）
description: 拿走莎尔的仪式匕首。（Take Shar's ceremonial dagger.）
wiki_description:
Take [Shar's ceremonial dagger](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ritual_Dagger_of_Shar).

- This prompts a fight with hostile undead Dark Justiciars.

title: 暗影铸就（Made of Shadows）
description: 解锁并拿走暗夜之矛。（Unlock and take the Spear of Rampant Night.）
wiki_description:
Unlock and take the [Spear of Rampant Night](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Spear_of_Night).

- The relevant weapon is actually called the Spear of Night.

title: 黑暗诡计（Dark Machinations）
description: 在莎尔铸铁神殿中用莎尔宝石填满所有孔位。（Fill all sockets with Sharran gems in the Gauntlet of Shar.）
wiki_description: Fill all sockets with Sharran gems in the Gauntlet of Shar.

title: 非人道试炼（Inhumane Trials）
description: 在被诅咒的治疗中心见证一场恐怖的手术。（Witness a horrid operation in the cursed house of healing.）
wiki_description: Witness a horrid operation in the cursed [house of healing](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Healing).

title: 没收的作品（Confiscated Works）
description: 从收费员的没收品宝箱中获得一件魔法物品。（Acquire a magical item from the toll collector's confiscation chest.）
wiki_description: Acquire a [magical item](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Fireheart) from the [toll collector's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Reithwin_Tollhouse) confiscation chest.

title: 简单工具，伟大作品（Simple Tools, Great Works）
description: 把乌尔布伦的工具还给他。（Return Wulbren's tools to him.）
wiki_description:
Return [Wulbren's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren_Bongle) tools to him.

- This doesn't need to be his hammer that was confiscated; any bludgeoning weapon, including the club that Wulbren can pick up on the docks, will award this Inspiration.

title: 备选职业（Alternative Vocations）
description: 参与夏芮丝的爱抚提供的俗艳服务。（Partake in the lurid services of Sharess' Caress.）
wiki_description:
Partake in a service from [Sharess' Caress](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharess%27_Caress):

- Accept a free drink from [Hoots Hooligan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hoots_Hooligan)

- Experience 'rapture' from [Naoise Nallinto](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Naoise_Nallinto)

- Hire either [Nym Orlith](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nym_Orlith) or [Sorn Orlith](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sorn_Orlith) or both

title: 兰坦娜·马维尔（Lantanna Marvel）
description: 掌控潜水器。（Take control of the submersible.）
wiki_description:
Take control of the [Submersible](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Flymm_Cargo).

- Despite the description, convincing [Redhammer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Redhammer) to operate the submersible also grants the inspiration.

title: 希望的进展（Sanguine Progress）
description: 查明阿拉吉和她的血液实验发生了什么。（Find out what happened to Araj and her blood experiment.）
wiki_description: Find out what happened to [Araj](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Araj_Oblodra) and her blood experiment.

title: 鼓励当地艺术家（Encouraging Local Artists）
description: 定制一尊你自己的雕像。（Commission a statue of yourself.）
wiki_description: Commission a [Statue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Boney) of yourself.

title: 免费广告（Free Advertisement）
description: 完成朗斯的采访。（Complete the interview with Lens.）
wiki_description: Complete the interview with [Lens](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lens).

title: 遵循指示（Following the Instructions）
description: 将感知护符返还给希拉。（Return the Sentient Amulet to Shirra.）
wiki_description: Return the [Sentient Amulet](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sentient_Amulet) to [Shirra](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shirra).

title: 远大梦想（Dream Big）
description: 向丹瑟隆描述你完美的武器。（Describe your perfect weapon to Gyldro Angleiron.）
wiki_description:
Describe your perfect weapon to [Gyldro Angleiron](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gyldro_Angleiron).

- This is only possible if [Orin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Orin) is impersonating the smith, and granted only if the answer to her third question is "Perhaps. If there was no other option"[[1]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-1)

- It is not necessary for the Guild Artisan character to be the one talking to Gyldro.

title: 游览观光（Touring the Sights）
description: 正确识别魔鬼的小费那里的所有圣物。（Correctly identify all of the Devil's Fee's relics.）
wiki_description:
Correctly identify all of the [Devil's Fee's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Devil%27s_Fee) relics.

- Despite the description, it is enough to correctly identify any two of the highlighted items (of four total).

- A  DC 15 [Arcana](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arcana) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) is required to identify each one of the items. For [Karlach](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Karlach), however, the check is DC 0 instead (a reliable way to obtain the inspiration).

title: 不道德的才智（Immoral Ingenuity）
description: 发现有陷阱的玩具。（Discover the booby-trapped toys.）
wiki_description: Discover the booby-trapped toys.

title: 酸味（Soured Taste）
description: 找到有毒的酒瓶。（Find the poisoned wine bottle.）
wiki_description: Find a bottle of poisoned wine at the [wine festival](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wine_Festival).

title: 恐怖之谜（Macabre Enigma）
description: 将德里波斯的尸体拼回去。（Piece the corpse of Dribbles back together.）
wiki_description: Piece the corpse of [Dribbles](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_Dribbles_the_Clown) back together.

title: 需要挥霍（Extravagance Required）
description: 从费加罗处获得一套精致的新衣服。（Acquire an exquisite new outfit from Figaro's.）
wiki_description:
Acquire an exquisite new outfit from Figaro's.

- Granted only upon trading with [Figaro Pennygood](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Figaro_Pennygood) himself. Trading with [Phlanders Hort](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Phlanders_Hort) if Figaro died does not count.

title: 这些应该在博物馆里！（These Belong in a Museum!）
description: 打开清账屋中任意一个特别保险库。（Open any of the special vaults in the Counting House.）
wiki_description: Open any of the special vaults in [The Counting House](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Counting_House).

title: 激情之焰（Flames of Passion）
description: 用驱散火炬烧掉奥斯卡的画。（Burn Oskar's painting with a Torch of Revocation.）
wiki_description: Burn [Oskar's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar_Fevras) painting with a [Torch of Revocation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Torch_of_Revocation).

title: 落笔成文（Putting the Pen to Paper）
description: 发现博德之口公报印刷机的内部运作原理。（Discover the inner workings of the Baldur's Mouth printing press.）
wiki_description: Discover the inner workings of the [Baldur's Mouth printing press.](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses)

title: 毁灭的艺术（The Art of Destruction）
description: 用符文火药炸弹摧毁钢铁卫士铸造厂。（Use the runepowder bomb to destroy the Steel Watch Foundry.）
