wiki_description: Use the [Runepowder Bomb](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Runepowder_Bomb) to destroy the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 稀世珍宝（A Golden Masterpiece）
description: 出售一个至少价值1000金币的物品。（Sell an item worth at least 1000 gold.）
wiki_description: Sell an item worth at least 1000 gold.

title: 珍贵客户（Valued Customer）
description: 与一位对你青睐有加的人交易。（Trade with someone who has High approval of you.）
wiki_description: Trade with someone who has High approval of you.

title: 杀戮狂欢（Killing Spree）
description: 一轮内击杀5名敌人。（Kill 5 enemies in a single round.）
wiki_description: Kill 5 enemies in a single round.

title: 不友好的火力（Unfriendly Fire）
description: 在一回合中击败5个中立生物。（Defeat 5 neutral creatures in a single round.）
wiki_description: Defeat 5 neutral creatures in a single round.

title: 痛苦盛装（Panoply of Agony）
description: 用每种类型的伤害击败一名敌人。（Defeat an enemy using every type of damage.）
wiki_description:
Get at least one kill with each [Damage type](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Damage_type).

- There are thirteen different damage types.

title: 断弦（Snipping the Chords）
description: 冷血杀死阿尔菲拉。（Kill Alfira in cold blood.）
wiki_description:
Kill [Alfira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Alfira) in cold blood.

- Killing [Quil Grootslang](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Quil_Grootslang) instead of Alfira does not count.

title: 新燃之火（Fresh Kindle for the Fire）
description: 任由被困住的本里恩燃烧。（Leave the pinned Benryn to burn.）
wiki_description:
Leave the pinned [Benryn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Benryn) to burn.

- Freeing Benryn but letting him die from the fire before he escapes counts.

title: 朋友重聚（Reuniting Friends）
description: 杀死布拉娜和安德里克，让他们与死去的同伴团圆。（Kill Brynna and Andrick, reuniting them with their fallen companion.）
wiki_description: Kill [Brynna](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brynna) and [Andrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Andrick), reuniting them with their fallen companion.

title: 人肉盛宴（Good Ol' Long Pig）
description: 吃一大块烹熟的矮人。（Eat a chunk of the cooked dwarf.）
wiki_description: Eat a chunk of the [cooked dwarf](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Roasted_Dwarf_Belly).

title: 抑制你的食欲（Subdue Thine Appetites）
description: 抵抗你的邪念。（Resist your Dark Urge.）
wiki_description:
Resist your Dark Urge.

- There are many opportunities to obtain this version, generally by choosing dialogue options related to refusing to give in to the urges, but only the first time this is done actually grants an inspiration point.

- Interaction catalysts include: Saving Gale, Okta, Arabella, and Sa'varsh Kethk, among others.

title: 现在派对开始！（Now It's a Party!）
description: 在偷来的酒中下毒，屠杀地精们。（Poison the stolen ale, slaughtering the goblins.）
wiki_description:
Poison the [stolen ale](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Goblin_Camp#Centre_Courtyard), slaughtering the goblins.

- Shared with ⁠[Culling the Crowd](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Culling_the_Crowd) and ⁠[Spiked](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Spiked).

title: 放纵你的食欲（Indulge Thine Appetites）
description: 顺从你的邪念。（Follow your Dark Urge.）
wiki_description:
Follow your Dark Urge.

- There are many opportunities to obtain this version, generally by choosing dialogue options related to giving in to the urges, but only the first time this is done actually grants an Inspiration Point.

- Interaction catalysts include: Killing Gale, Timber, Arabella, Wounded Bird, Okta, Remira, Pandirna, Zevlor, Lady Esther, Blood of Lathander, and the Strange Ox in Act 2, among others.

title: 嗜血生物（Creatures of Bloodlust）
description: 招募食人魔雇佣兵，用敌人的尸体作为报酬。（Recruit the ogre mercenaries, using the corpses of your enemies as payment.）
wiki_description:
Recruit the [ogre mercenaries](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lump_the_Enlightened), using the corpses of your enemies as payment.

- Shared with ⁠[Bodyguards for Hire](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Bodyguards_for_Hire) and ⁠[Pyramid Scheme](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Pyramid_Scheme).

title: 管理焕新（New Management）
description: 替格拉特杀死蕈人王。（Kill the Myconid Sovereign for Glut.）
wiki_description: Kill the [Myconid Sovereign](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Spaw) for [Glut](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Glut).

title: 蛇之头（Head of the Snake）
description: 取下尼讷的头。（Take Nere's head.）
wiki_description: Take [Nere's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nere) [head](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nere%27s_Head).

title: 睡觉，偶尔会做触手梦（To Sleep, Perchance To Dream Tentacled Dreams）
description: 让动弹不得的夺心魔永远闭上双眼。（Close the pinned mind flayer's eyes forever.）
wiki_description: Close the [pinned mind flayer's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mind_flayer_(nautiloid_wreck)) eyes forever.

title: 抑制你的食欲（Subdue Thine Appetites）
description: 抵抗你的邪念。（Resist your Dark Urge.）
wiki_description:
Resist your Dark Urge.

- There are many opportunities to obtain this version, generally by choosing dialogue options related to refusing to give in to the urges, but only the first time this is done actually grants an inspiration point.

- Interaction catalysts include: Saving Gale, Okta, Arabella, and Sa'varsh Kethk, among others.

title: 有德屠杀（Morally Acceptable Massacre）
description: 让地精们洒下鲜血。（Spill the blood of the goblins.）
wiki_description: [Spill the blood](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Defeat_the_Goblins) of the goblins.

title: 嗜血友情（Camaraderie in Bloodthirst）
description: 让提夫林们洒下鲜血。（Spill the blood of the tieflings.）
wiki_description: [Spill the blood](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Raid_the_Emerald_Grove) of the tieflings.

title: 双手抓住拨火棍（Grabbing the Poker with Both Hands）
description: 亲自拷问利亚姆。（Torture Liam yourself.）
wiki_description:
Torture [Liam](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Liam).

- The option to torture Liam is not available to [Drow](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Drow) characters. To do this, they must be disguised as anyone but a drow.[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)]

title: 熟悉的陌生人（Unfamiliar Familiarity）
description: 将守墓人从坟墓中放出。（Release Withers from his tomb.）
wiki_description: Release [Withers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Withers) from his tomb.

title: 尸血干涸（Bleeding the Corpse Dry）
description: 杀死死灵法师。（Kill the necromancer.）
wiki_description: Kill the [necromancer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar).

title: 缺乏节制是关键（Lack of Moderation is Key）
description: 用酿酒师自己酿的酒杀死他。（Kill the brewer with his own brew.）
wiki_description: Kill the [brewer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm) with his own brew.

title: 太容易（Too Easy）
description: 处决这些无用的地精。（Execute the useless goblins.）
wiki_description: Execute the useless goblins.

title: 强制责任（Forcing Responsibility）
description: 要求地精取回他的骨头。（Demand that the goblin fetch his bone.）
wiki_description: Demand that [the goblin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gronag) fetch his bone.

title: 月食（Lunar Eclipse）
description: 杀死终焉光芒的守护者。（Kill the protector of Last Light.）
wiki_description: Kill the [protector](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel_Thorm) of [Last Light](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn).

title: 强制退休（Forced Retirement）
description: 永久结束贾希拉的生涯。（End Jaheira's career permanently.）
wiki_description: End [Jaheira's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Jaheira) career permanently.

title: 帝中之弟（Lesser of the Three）
description: 杀死米尔寇的使者。（Kill the envoy of Myrkul.）
wiki_description: Kill the envoy of Myrkul.

title: 灵魂的额叶切断（Soulful Lobotomy）
description: 折磨明萨拉，使她失去自我。（Torture Minthara, reducing her to a husk of her former self.）
wiki_description:
[Torture Minthara](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Decide_Minthara%27s_Fate), reducing her to a husk of her former self.

- Obtained if the Urge personally erases Minthara's mind; letting the Inquisitors do it does not grant an inspiration point.

title: 自我鞭挞（Self-Flagellation）
description: 在莎尔的试炼中杀死你自己的镜像。（Kill your mirror-self in Shar's trial.）
wiki_description:
Kill your mirror-self in Shar's trial.

- Shared with the ⁠[Know Thine Enemy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Know_Thine_Enemy) inspiration.

title: 谁把豺狼人放出来了（Who Let the Gnolls Out）
description: 把豺狼人从束缚中释放出来。（Release the gnolls from their leashes.）
wiki_description: Release the gnolls from their leashes.

title: 血月（Blood Moon）
description: 杀死月之女儿。（Kill the daughter of the moon.）
wiki_description: Kill the [Daughter of the Moon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin).

title: 杀手诗歌（Killer Poetry）
description: 诱骗血甲魔相信一个虚假漏洞。（Trick the orthon with a false loophole.）
wiki_description:
Trick the [orthon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir) with a false loophole.

- Requires the interacting party member to succeed a passive  DC 14 [Insight](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Insight) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) in the initial dialogue with Yurgir to detect a tricky clause in the text of the contract. [Bards](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bard) and [Warlocks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Warlock) pass this check automatically.

- Shared with the ⁠[The Devil's in the Details](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#The_Devil's_in_the_Details) inspiration.

title: 蝇拍（Fly-Swatter）
description: 杀死捣乱的皮克精。（Kill the trickster pixie.）
wiki_description:
Kill the [trickster pixie](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dolly_Dolly_Dolly).

- This can also be triggered by arriving to Moonrise Towers with Kar'niss' convoy.

title: 手术刀下（Under the Knife）
description: 利用外科医生自己的护士奴仆杀死他。（Kill the surgeon using his own servile nurses.）
wiki_description: Kill the [surgeon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm) using his own servile nurses.

title: 与影同游（Swimming with the Shadows）
description: 强迫散塔林走私者跳下码头。（Force the Zhent smuggler to jump off the docks.）
wiki_description: Force the [Zhent smuggler](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Marls) to jump off the docks.

title: 归来（Homecoming）
description: 找到博德之门地下的巴尔神殿。（Discover the Temple of Bhaal beneath Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description: Discover the Temple of Bhaal beneath Baldur's Gate.

title: 清理渣滓（Cleaning up the Scum）
description: 将两个对立的走私派系都杀死。（Kill both of the opposing smuggling factions.）
wiki_description: Kill both of the opposing smuggling factions.

title: 众多之一（First of Many）
description: 要求一尊你凡人形态的雕像。（Request a statue of your mortal form.）
wiki_description: Request a statue of your mortal form.

title: 剔除模仿者（Culling the Imitator）
description: 杀死这位自称的刺客。（Kill the wannabe assassin.）
wiki_description: Kill the [wannabe assassin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dolor).

title: 巴尔后裔再临（Return of the Bhaalspawn）
description: 拥抱你的传承。（Embrace your legacy.）
wiki_description: Embrace your legacy.

title: 重尝杀戮（Re-tasting the Kill）
description: 第二次杀死埃赛尔 —— 那个沼泽里的顽固又丑陋的鬼婆。（Kill Ethel a second time - that stubborn, swampy scandal of a hag.）
wiki_description:
Kill [Ethel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Auntie_Ethel) a second time - that stubborn, swampy scandal of a hag.

- Despite mentioning a second time, this inspiration is rewarded even if Ethel was not killed in Act One.

title: 血的痕迹（Trail of Blood）
description: 找齐德里波斯的所有碎块。（Collect all the pieces of Dribbles.）
wiki_description: Collect all the pieces of [Dribbles](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_Dribbles_the_Clown).

title: 粉碎黑色之手（Shattering the Black Hand）
description: 杀死将成之暴君。（Kill the would-be tyrant.）
wiki_description: Kill the [would-be Tyrant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Enver_Gortash).

title: 高处不胜寒（How High They Fall）
description: 杀死自负的未来不朽者。（Kill the egotistic would-be immortal.）
wiki_description: Kill the egotistic [would-be immortal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lorroakan).

title: 纯真之死（Death of Innocence）
description: 成为巴尔的亵渎刺客。（Become the Unholy Assassin of Bhaal.）
wiki_description: Become the [Unholy Assassin of Bhaal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Impress_the_Murder_Tribunal).

title: 有点过头（A Step Too Far）
description: 拯救瓦莱里亚，拒绝巴尔的赠礼。（Save Valeria, rejecting Bhaal's gifts.）
wiki_description: Save [Valeria](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria), rejecting [Bhaal's gifts](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_the_Murders#Infiltrate_the_Murder_Tribunal).

title: 晚到的屠杀（An Overdue Slaughter）
description: 给秘术师卡里翁的生命带来一个久违的高潮。（Pull off a long-overdue climax to the life of Mystic Carrion.）
wiki_description: Pull off a long-overdue climax to the life of [Mystic Carrion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mystic_Carrion).

title: 意外的养育（Unexpected Parenting）
description: 给新生的夺心魔喂一个大脑。（Feed a brain to the newborn mind flayer.）
wiki_description: Feed a brain to the newborn [mind flayer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mind_flayer_(windmill)).

title: 英年早逝（Kill 'Em While They're Young）
description: 处决新生的夺心魔。（Execute the newborn mind flayer.）
wiki_description: Execute the newborn [mind flayer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mind_flayer_(windmill)).

title: 血流欢愉（Exsanguinated Ecstacy）
description: 接受妮夏的求欢（Accept Naoise's lewd proposition.）
wiki_description: Accept [Naoise's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Naoise) lewd proposition.

title: 以血写就（Written in Blood）
description: 接受奥林的结盟提议。（Accept Orin's proposition of alliance.）
wiki_description: Accept Orin's proposition of alliance.

title: 个人关系（Personal Relations）
description: 遇见奥林假扮的其中一人。（Meet one of Orin's impersonations.）
wiki_description: Meet one of [Orin's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Orin) impersonations.

title: 确保防线（Securing Your Line）
description: 成为巴尔的第一后裔。（Become the primary descendant of Bhaal.）
wiki_description:
Become the primary descendant of Bhaal.

- Shared with the ⁠[Putting the Past to Rest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Putting_the_Past_to_Rest) inspiration

title: 巴尔后裔之死（Bhaalspawn No More）
description: 拒绝你的传承。（Reject your legacy.）
wiki_description: Reject your legacy.

title: 后裔清理队（Spawn Cleanup Crew）
description: 击败巴尔的邪恶遗产。（Defeat Bhaal's wretched legacy.）
wiki_description: Defeat Bhaal's [wretched legacy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sarevok).

title: 弱者有弱礼（Weak Gifts for Weak Beings）
description: 把献给神的少得可怜的祭品据为己有。（Take the measly offerings to the gods for yourself.）
wiki_description: Take the [measly offerings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stormshore_Tabernacle) to the gods for yourself.

title: 超越想象的大屠杀（A Massacre Beyond Imagining）
description: 用乌尔布伦的秘密武器消灭钢铁卫士铸造厂。（Annihilate the Steel Watch Foundry with Wulbren's secret weapon.）
wiki_description: Annihilate the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry) with [Wulbren's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren) secret weapon.

title: 贵族义务（Noblesse Oblige）
description: 在对话中无视一位插嘴同伴的诉求。（Ignore the pleas or requests of a companion in dialogue.）
wiki_description:
Dismiss a companion for interrupting a conversation or Ignore the pleas or requests of a companion in dialogue.

- This only works as a [Custom](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Custom) party member,[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)] and does not work with [Hirelings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hirelings).

- It is possible to let [Lae'zel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lae%27zel) make [Zorru](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zorru) bow or kneel once to get [approval](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Approval), and then step in after.

title: 厅上厅下（Lest Ye Be Judged）
description: 了解到阿斯代伦作为裁判官的过往。（Learn Astarion's history as a magistrate.）
wiki_description:
Learn [Astarion's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Astarion) history as a magistrate.

- This only works as a [Custom](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Custom) party member,[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)] and does not work with [Hirelings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hirelings).

title: 公爵的保护者（Protector of the Duke）
description: 从燃烧的旅店中救出弗洛瑞克顾问。（Rescue Counsellor Florrick from the burning inn.）
wiki_description:
Rescue [Counsellor Florrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Counsellor_Florrick) from the [burning inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Waukeen%27s_Rest).

- This is earned after speaking to Counsellor Florrick.

title: 避世王族（Blueblood Solidarity）
description: 了解威尔的家族历史。（Learn Wyll's family history.）
wiki_description:
Learn [Wyll's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wyll) family history.

- This only works as a [Custom](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Custom) party member,[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)] and does not work with [Hirelings](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Hirelings).

- Wyll must be spoken with after saving [Counsellor Florrick](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Counsellor_Florrick) at [Waukeen's Rest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Waukeen%27s_Rest).

title: 贴身保镖（Bodyguards for Hire）
description: 招募食人魔来保护你。（Recruit the ogres to protect you.）
wiki_description:
Recruit the [ogres](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lump_the_Enlightened) to protect you.

- Shared with ⁠[Pyramid Scheme](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Pyramid_Scheme) and ⁠[Creatures of Bloodlust](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Creatures_of_Bloodlust).

title: 自知之明（Know Your Place）
description: 利用你在卓尔母系社会中的地位来要求道恩放弃他的寻找。（Leverage your role in the drow matriarchy to force Dhourn to abandon his quest.）
wiki_description:
Leverage the player character's role in the drow matriarchy to force [Dhourn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dhourn) to abandon his quest.

- The dialogue option to do this can be made available to non-Drow characters through the use of [Disguise Self](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Disguise_Self).

title: 灵魂有价（Soul for Sale）
description: 获取一枚灵魂钱币作为个人收藏。（Acquire a Soul Coin for your personal collection.）
wiki_description:
Acquire a [Soul Coin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soul_Coin) for your personal collection.

- The earliest options to earn this are looting a coin from the chest in the [Dank Crypt](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dank_Crypt) or convincing [Nadira](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nadira) in the [Emerald Grove](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Emerald_Grove).

title: 全能高手（A Man of Many Talents）
description: 让瓦罗加入你的营地。（Expand your retinue by bringing Volo to camp.）
wiki_description: Expand your retinue by bringing [Volo](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Volo) to camp.

title: 有来有往（Favour for a Favour）
description: 为顾问弗洛瑞克何焰拳唤醒阿尔特。（Wake Art for Counsellor Florrick and the Flaming Fist.）
wiki_description: [Wake Art](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wake_up_Art_Cullagh) for Counsellor Florrick and the Flaming Fist.

title: 肉盾（Meat Shield）
description: 获得巴萨扎尔的铃铛并召唤他的血肉魔像。（Obtain Balthazar's bell and summon his flesh golem.）
wiki_description:
Obtain Balthazar's bell and summon his flesh golem.

- The inspiration is not granted on attempt to summon [Flesh](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Flesh) in a battle against Balthazar himself.

title: 没法全都贿赂（Can't Bribe 'Em All）
description: 贿赂月出的狱卒。（Bribe Moonrise's warden.）
wiki_description: Bribe Moonrise's [warden](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Warden).

title: 奇特的随从（Odd Entourage）
description: 完成蛛化精灵到月出的护送。（Complete the drider escort to Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Complete the [drider](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kar%27niss) escort to Moonrise.

title: 铁拳（An Iron Fist）
description: 处决这些地精。（Execute the goblins.）
wiki_description:
Execute the goblins.

- Mutually exclusive with the ⁠[A Velvet Glove](https://bg3.wiki#A_Velvet_Glove) inspiration.

- Shared with the ⁠[Too Easy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Too_Easy) inspiration.

title: 天鹅绒手套（A Velvet Glove）
description: 放过这些地精。（Spare the goblins.）
wiki_description:
Spare the goblins.

- Mutually exclusive with the ⁠[An Iron Fist](https://bg3.wiki#An_Iron_Fist) inspiration.

- Shared with the ⁠[Newly Downtrodden](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Newly_Downtrodden) inspiration.

title: 凯瑟里克之死（Ketheric's Loss）
description: 了解凯瑟里克的过往。（Learn Ketheric's past.）
wiki_description:
Learn [Ketheric's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric_Thorm) past.

- Read the letter in the locked chest at the foot of Kethric's bed and investigate the plaque in front of Isobel's sarcophagus.

title: 达到巅峰（Top of the Ladder）
description: 去月出的顶上找凯瑟里克。（Meet Ketheric at the top of Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Meet Ketheric at the top of Moonrise.

title: 高贵的猫（Noble Feline）
description: 和终焉光芒那只贵族气派的猫交谈。（Speak with the lordly cat at Last Light.）
wiki_description:
Speak with the [lordly cat](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/His_Majesty) at Last Light.

- Only obtainable the first time a character speaks with His Majesty.

title: 拒绝交税（Taxes? Never Heard of 'Em）
description: 不给收费员任何黄金。（Don't give any gold to the toll collector.）
wiki_description: Don't give any gold to the [toll collector](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm).

title: 林地贵族（Patrician of the Grove）
description: 招募哈尔辛。（Recruit Halsin.）
wiki_description: Recruit [Halsin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Halsin).

title: 贵族下如是，上亦然（Nobleborn as Below, so Above）
description: 招募明萨拉。（Recruit Minthara.）
wiki_description: Recruit [Minthara](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Minthara).

title: 暗影之认可（Recognised by Shadows）
description: 通过莎尔的所有试炼。（Pass all of Shar's trials.）
wiki_description: Pass all of Shar's [trials](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Trials).

title: 底层外交官（Underbelly Diplomat）
description: 获得进入下层地下室的方法。（Gain access to the Undercellar.）
wiki_description:
Gain access to the [Undercellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guildhall).

- Shared with ⁠[Friends in Low Places](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Friends_in_Low_Places) inspiration.

title: 万金油（The Right Oil for Any Situation）
description: 获得进入马戏团的方法。（Gain access to the circus.）
wiki_description:
Gain access to the [circus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Circus_of_the_Last_Days).

- The inspiration cannot be gained if the party have already entered the circus' territory through an alternative route (e.g., from the [Open Hand Temple](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Open_Hand_Temple)). In this case, the gatekeeper [Klaus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Klaus) behaves as if they have already convinced him.

title: 施舍不幸者（Alms for the Unfortunate）
description: 给难民捐一些东西。（Donate something to the refugees.）
wiki_description:
[Donate something](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nestor) to the refugees.

- Shared with ⁠[Sharing the Spoils](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Sharing_the_Spoils) and ⁠[Spare What You Can](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Spare_What_You_Can) inspirations.

title: 末日交易（An Apocalyptic Deal）
description: 接受一个不可能的交易。（Accept an impossible deal.）
wiki_description:
Convince someone to [aid you during the endgame](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gather_Your_Allies) or by making a deal with [Raphael](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Raphael)
This can be awarded by:

- Convincing [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) or [Nine-Fingers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nine-Fingers) to aid the party in the battle for Baldur's Gate.

- Defeating Raphael in the House of Hope, while first convincing [Yurgir](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir) to join the party's side.

- Siding with [Wulbren Bongle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren_Bongle) during [Disable the Steel Watch](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Disable_the_Steel_Watch).

- Recruiting [Auntie Ethel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Auntie_Ethel) as an ally.

title: 更新你的衣柜（Updating Your Wardrobe）
description: 从费加罗处获得一件华美的新衣服。（Obtain a sumptuous new garment from Figaro's.）
wiki_description:
Obtain a sumptuous new garment from [Figaro's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Figaro_Pennygood).

- Granted only upon trading with Figaro Pennygood himself. Trading with [Phlanders Hort](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Phlanders_Hort) if Figaro died does not count.

title: 通信中断（Interrupted Communications）
description: 找出失踪信件的去向。（Discover where the missing letters went.）
wiki_description: Discover where [the missing letters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_the_Missing_Letters) went.

title: 胁迫的手段（The Means of Coercion）
description: 找出贡德信徒配合戈塔什的真正原因。（Find the true reason the Gondians are cooperating with Gortash.）
wiki_description:
Find the true reason the Gondians are cooperating with [Gortash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Enver_Gortash).

- Awarded by witnessing the conversation between Gondian [Lowa](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lowa) and Black Gauntlet [Tamia Holzt](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Tamia_Holzt) when first entering the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 道德的财富（The Wealth of Morality）
description: 在公会和散塔林会之间选择你的效忠对象。（Choose your allegiance between the Guild and the Zhentarim.）
wiki_description:
Choose your allegiance between the Guild and the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim).

- Granted for picking either side during the final confrontation in the [Aid the Underduke](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aid_the_Underduke) quest.

- [Roah Moonglow](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Roah_Moonglow) or [Friol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Friol) must survive and escape on the previous stage of the quest.[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)]

title: 新闻发布（Press Release）
description: 完成朗斯的采访。（Complete Lens' interview.）
wiki_description:
Complete [Lens'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lens) interview.

- Only obtainable if [Orin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Orin) is impersonating Lens.[[verify](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/bg3wiki:Verification)][[2]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-2)

- Shared with ⁠[Blabbermouth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Blabbermouth) and ⁠[Free Advertisement](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guild_Artisan#Free_Advertisement) inspirations.

title: 做出判断（Exerting Judgement）
description: 结束商人和占屋难民之间的争吵。（End the squabbling between the merchant and the squatters.）
wiki_description:
End the squabbling between [the merchant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio) and the squatters.

- If letting the [Rivington Rats](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zenovia_Dawg) deal with the squatters, the inspiration is not given.

title: 藏品的名字（Titles for the Collection）
description: 成为巴尔的亵渎刺客。（Become the Unholy Assassin of Bhaal.）
wiki_description: Become the [Unholy Assassin of Bhaal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Impress_the_Murder_Tribunal).

title: 新实验对象（Newfound Subject）
description: 给刚转化的夺心魔喂一个大脑。（Feed a brain to the freshly turned mind flayer.）
wiki_description:
[Feed a brain](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Feed_the_Mind_Flayer) to the freshly turned mindflayer.

- Shared with ⁠[Unexpected Parenting](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Unexpected_Parenting) inspiration.

title: 平冤昭雪（Defamed No More）
description: 破坏印刷机。（Sabotage the printing press.）
wiki_description: [Sabotage](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses) the printing press.

title: 多重通过（Multipass）
description: 利用雷文伽德的紧急信函通过焰拳的检查点。（Use the urgent Ravengard missive to pass the Flaming Fist checkpoint.）
wiki_description:
Use the [urgent Ravengard missive](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urgent_Report_for_Duke_Ravengard) to pass the Flaming Fist checkpoint.

- This document is at [Sword Coast Couriers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sword_Coast_Couriers) on a cabinet behind [Danzo Arkwright](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Danzo_Arkwright).

- Shared with ⁠[Rock-Solid Alibi](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Rock-Solid_Alibi) inspiration.

title: 与强者为伍（Backing the Established Players）
description: 在对峙中站在公会一边。（Side with the Guild during the confrontation.）
wiki_description:
Side with the [Guild](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Guild) during the [confrontation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Western_Beach#Cave_tunnel_and_the_hidden_bay).

- Shared with ⁠[Stacking the Deck](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Stacking_the_Deck) inspiration.

title: 品酒家（Wine Connoisseur）
description: 警告海伯瑞夫人有毒酒。（Warn Mrs Highberry of the poisoned wine.）
wiki_description: Warn [Mrs Highberry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_the_Murders#Cora_Highberry) of the poisoned wine.

title: 走他妈的流程（Procedures be Damned）
description: 在没有通行证的情况下进入飞龙岩要塞。（Enter Wyrm's Rock without a pass.）
wiki_description:
Enter [Wyrm's Rock](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wyrm%27s_Rock) without a pass.

- Shared with ⁠[Through Nooks and Crannies](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Through_Nooks_and_Crannies) inspiration.

title: 与人为善（Penchant for Diplomacy）
description: 使一位同伴对你青睐有加。（Reach a High level of approval with a companion.）
wiki_description: Reach a High level of [approval](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Approval) with a [companion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Companion).

title: 没人跟钱过不去（Fine By Me）
description: 用钱买通一个守卫。（Use your wealth to bribe a guard.）
wiki_description: Use your wealth to bribe a guard.

title: 巨龙财宝（Dragon's Hoard）
description: 小队金币达到2000。（Have at least 2000 gold among the party.）
wiki_description:
Have at least 2000 gold among the party.

- Only obtainable the first time the threshold of 2000 gold is reached.

title: 鼎鼎大名（Entitled）
description: 因为自己的行为而得到称号。（Earn a title for your deeds.）
wiki_description:
Earn a title from your deeds.
This can be awarded by doing the following:

- [Killing the duergar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Defeat_the_Duergar_Intruders) for [Sovereign Spaw](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Spaw).

- [Persuading Kagha](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_Kagha) to abandon the [Shadow Druids](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadow_Druids), thus earning the title "Faithwarden" (available only for a [Druid](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Druid) characters).

- Earning the "Mahkloompah" title from the Kuo-toa in [Festering Cove](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Festering_Cove) does not grant this inspiration.

title: 诡异权威（Eldritch Authority）
description: 成为一个真魂者。（Become a True Soul.）
wiki_description: Become a [True Soul](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Illithid_Persuasion). Use [illithid](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Illithid_Persuasion) dialogue options in conversations 7 times.[[1]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-1)

title: 坚若磐石（Rock Steady）
description: 从强盗的滚石陷阱中幸存。（Survive the bandits' rolling boulder trap.）
wiki_description:
Survive the bandit's rolling boulder trap.

- The trap blocks the cave mouth at X: 50 Y: 570.

- The description is misleading; disarming or getting around the two tripwire traps awards the inspiration, while getting hit by the boulder and surviving does not.

title: 不入虎穴（Nest Egg）
description: 从食腐虫巢穴中获得一件物品。（Take an item from the Carrion Crawler nest.）
wiki_description:
Take an item from the [Carrion Crawler nest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Carrion_crawler_nest).

- The inspiration is awarded only after the passive  DC 15 [Survival](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Survival) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check), which, in turn, is available only to Short races, e.g. [Halfling](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Halfling), [Dwarf](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dwarf) or [Gnome](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gnome).

title: 火急火燎（The Floor Is Lava）
description: 在熔岩湖击败熔岩元素。（Defeat the Lava Elemental in the lava lake.）
wiki_description: Defeat the [Lava Elemental](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lava_Elemental) in the lava lake.

title: 母亲之怒（A Mother's Fury）
description: 战胜枭熊母亲。（Triumph over the mother Owlbear.）
wiki_description:
Triumph over the mother [Owlbear](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Owlbear).

- Does not require actually fighting the Owlbear. Convincing her not to attack using [Speak with Animals](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Speak_with_Animals) is sufficient.

title: 梯云纵（Walking on Air）
description: 成功使用一次妖精之环。（Successfully use a fairy ring.）
wiki_description:
Successfully use a fairy ring.

- "Fairy ring" refers to the [mushroom circles](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mushroom_Circle) found in the [Sunlit Wetlands](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sunlit_Wetlands), in the [Overgrown Tunnel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Overgrown_Tunnel) or in the [Underdark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Underdark).

title: 野性之眼（Eyes of the Wild）
description: 看穿笼罩沼泽的幻术。（See past the illusion covering the swamp.）
wiki_description: See past the illusion covering the swamp.

title: 破咒者（Cursebreaker）
description: 发现伊诺胡的诅咒并消灭他的鬣狗。（Discover the curse of Yeenoghu and destroy his hyenas.）
wiki_description:
Discover the curse of [Yeenoghu](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yeenoghu) and destroy his hyenas.

- The nearby gnolls must also be killed.

title: 深渊无门跳进来（Abyss Jumper）
description: 通过无底深井进入幽暗地域。（Enter the Underdark through the bottomless well.）
wiki_description:
The party must enter the [Underdark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Underdark) through the bottomless well.

- [Feather Fall](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Feather_Fall) effects, via spell or potion, can be used to survive the fall.

- This can be acquired even if the Underdark was previously entered via some other way.

title: 高贵之举（A Noble Endeavour）
description: 有效使用一枚箴言菇。（Effectively use a noblestalk mushroom.）
wiki_description:
Effectively use a noblestalk mushroom.

- This can be accomplished by giving the mushroom to [Derryth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Derryth_Bonecloak), [Shadowheart](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadowheart), or [Baelen](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Baelen_Bonecloak), or by [The Dark Urge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Dark_Urge) using it themselves.

title: 见财起意（Sticky Fingers）
description: 获得蜘蛛洞中的小袋。（Secure the pouch from the spider crevice.）
wiki_description: Secure the pouch from the [spider crevice](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Harper_Outpost).

title: 从小教起（Cub Tamer）
description: 成功驯服一只枭熊幼崽。（Successfully tame the owlbear cub.）
wiki_description:
Successfully tame the [owlbear cub](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Owlbear_Cub).

- The inspiration is given after the cub comes to the camp for the second time and if then stays as a follower.

title: 鸠占鹊巢（Clever Cuckoo）
description: 从幽暗地域的巨型鸟巢中偷窃。（Steal from the giant bird's nest in the Underdark.）
wiki_description:
Steal from the giant bird's nest in the [Underdark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Underdark).

- The nest can be reaced by series of jumps up from X: 43 Y: -141. The chest inside can be looted freely.

title: 吃完一起躺板板（Mushroom Enthusiast）
description: 摧毁幽暗地域的每一类危险蘑菇。（Destroy each kind of hazardous Underdark mushroom.）
wiki_description:
Destroy each kind of hazardous Underdark mushroom.

- The party must destroy at least one stalk of [Bibberbangs](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bibberbang), [Timmasks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Timmask) and [Torchstalks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Torchstalk), regardless of the order. [Nightlights](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nightlight) and [Barrelstalks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barrelstalk) do not count.

- The inspiration is given regardless of whether any party member got hurt from the mushrooms' effects.

title: 最少走的路（Path Least Followed）
description: 在不前往终焉光芒和月出的情况下，完成莎尔铸铁神殿。（Complete the Gauntlet of Shar without going to Last Light or Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Complete the Gauntlet of Shar without going to [Last Light](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn) or [Moonrise](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers).

title: 不算最糟的（I've Had Worse）
description: 成功喝下酿酒师调制的酒并抵御其负面效果。（Successfully drink and resist the negative effects of the brewer's concoction.）
wiki_description:
Successfully drink and resist the negative effects of the [brewer's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm) concoction.

- It is not necessary for the Outlander to actually do this; they just need to be present when someone does.

title: 无惧阴影（I Ain't Afraid of No Shadows）
description: 在不使用月亮提灯的情况下，穿越幽影诅咒之地抵达终焉光芒和月出。（Traverse through the Shadow-Cursed Lands to Last Light and Moonrise without using a Moonlantern.）
wiki_description: Traverse through the Shadow-Cursed Lands to [Last Light](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn) and [Moonrise](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers) without using a Moonlantern.

title: 从头到脚（From Head to Toe）
description: 探索夺心魔殖民地的所有区域。（Explore all sections of the mind flayer colony.）
wiki_description:
Explore all sections of the mind flayer colony.

- This is awarded upon following [Ketheric](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric_Thorm) to the lower level.

title: 从来不喜欢楼梯（Never Liked Stairs）
description: 从外部进入月出之塔的禁区。（Enter a restricted area in Moonrise Towers from the outside.）
wiki_description:
Enter a [restricted area](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers#First_floor) in Moonrise Towers from the outside.
It can be one of the following rooms:

- Isobel's room

- Ketheric's chambers

- Balthazar's lab

title: 潜入深处（Delving into the Deep）
description: 进入地下密牢... 无论结果好坏。（Enter the oubliette... for better or for worse.）
wiki_description: Enter the [oubliette](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oubliette)... for better or for worse.

title: 睡在黑暗中（Sleeping in the Dark）
description: 在幽影诅咒之地进行一次完整长休。（Take a full Long Rest in the Shadow-Cursed Lands.）
wiki_description:
Take a full Long Rest in the [Shadow-Cursed Lands](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadow-Cursed_Lands).

- This is only awarded for resting in a camp that's out in the actual dangerous area. The camp at [Last Light Inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn) does not count.

title: 相互尊重（Mutual Respect）
description: 见到狩猎夺心魔蝌蚪的猫。（Meet the tadpole-hunting cat.）
wiki_description: Meet [Steelclaw](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steelclaw) the tadpole-hunting cat.

title: 永远领先黑暗一步（Always a Step Ahead of the Darkness）
description: 在不受幽影诅咒影响的情况下找到暗夜之歌。（Reach Nightsong without having been affected by the shadow curse.）
wiki_description:
Reach [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin) without having been affected by the shadow curse.

- This is not granted when you reach Nightsong, but when you come back from the [Shadowfell](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadowfell).

title: 行业工具（Tools of the Trade）
description: 取得血甲魔的弩。（Obtain the orthon's crossbow.）
wiki_description: Obtain [the orthon's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir) crossbow.

title: 林地守护者的守护者（Grove Keeper's Keeper）
description: 在哈尔辛拯救大地之灵时保护好他的传送门。（Protect Halsin's portal while he saves the spirit of the land.）
wiki_description: Protect [Halsin's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Halsin) portal while he saves the [spirit of the land](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thaniel).

title: 打破诅咒问到底（No Cursed Stone Left Unturned）
description: 探索幽影诅咒之地的每个关键区域。（Explore each key area of the Shadow-Cursed Lands.）
wiki_description:
Explore each key area of the Shadow-Cursed Lands.

- The party must visit the [Ruined Battlefield](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ruined_Battlefield), [Reithwin Town](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Reithwin_Town), the [Last Light Inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Last_Light_Inn), and reach the [Gauntlet of Shar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gauntlet_of_Shar) (through the [Grand Mausoleum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Grand_Mausoleum)). The inspiration is given upon entering the last of all four locations, regardless of the order. Thorough exploration is not needed.

title: 拥抱环境（Embracing the Environment）
description: 挺过两轮幽影诅咒。（Survive two rounds of the shadow curse.）
wiki_description:
Survive two rounds of the shadow curse.

- The inspiration is given at the start of the third turn, if the character feeling the curse effect is still alive and not downed. It does not need to be the character with the Outlander background themselves.

title: 黑暗中的颠簸（Bumps in the Dark）
description: 在幽影诅咒之地打赢三场遭遇战。（Conquer three combat encounters in the Shadow-Cursed Lands.）
wiki_description: Conquer three combat encounters in the Shadow-Cursed Lands.

title: 孩童游戏（Child's Play）
description: 在不惊动幽影生物的情况下，在捉迷藏中战胜奥利弗。（Beat Oliver at hide and seek without alerting the shadow creatures.）
wiki_description:
Beat [Oliver](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oliver) at hide and seek without alerting the shadow creatures.

- This requires winning both rounds of Oliver's game.

title: 邪恶之面（The Face of Evil）
description: 抵达巴尔神殿。（Reach the Temple of Bhaal.）
wiki_description:
Reach the [Temple of Bhaal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Temple_of_Bhaal).

- Shared with ⁠[Forgotten, Bloodied, Halls](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Forgotten,_Bloodied,_Halls) and ⁠[Homecoming](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Homecoming) inspirations.

title: 城市丛林（Urban Jungle）
description: 挺过巴尔信徒在公园的伏击。（Survive the Bhaalist ambush at the park.）
wiki_description: Survive the Bhaalist ambush at the [park](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bloomridge_Park).

title: 野性释放（Running Wild）
description: 释放马戏团所有被囚禁的野兽。（Release all the imprisoned circus beasts.）
wiki_description:
Release all the imprisoned [circus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Circus_of_the_Last_Days) beasts.

- Mutually exclusive with the ⁠[Primary Needs](https://bg3.wiki#Primary_Needs) inspiration.

- If [Crimson](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crimson) is fed before unlocking his cage, he does not run away, and the inspiration cannot be gained.

title: 恐怖狩猎（Macabre Hunt）
description: 找齐德里波斯身体的所有碎块并还给卢克修斯。（Find all the pieces of Dribbles' body and return them to Lucretious.）
wiki_description: Find all the pieces of [Dribbles](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_Dribbles_the_Clown)' body and return them to [Lucretious](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lucretious).

title: 来之不易的热乎饭（For Once, a Warm Meal）
description: 在精灵之歌酒馆获得食宿。（Obtain room and board at the Elfsong Tavern.）
wiki_description:
Obtain room and board at the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

- Shared with ⁠[Proper Lodging, Finally](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Proper_Lodging,_Finally), ⁠[Veteran's Hotspot](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Veteran's_Hotspot), and ⁠[Perks of the Trade](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Perks_of_the_Trade) inspirations (the latter if a discount was gained).

title: 大门之下（Beneath the Gate）
description: 进入下层地下室。（Enter the Undercellar.）
wiki_description:
Enter the [Undercellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guildhall).

- Shared with ⁠[Friends in Low Places](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Friends_in_Low_Places) and ⁠[Underbelly Diplomat](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Underbelly_Diplomat) inspirations.

title: 基本需求（Primary Needs）
description: 驯服双脊龙，使其对你无敌意。（Tame the dilophosaurus, making it non-hostile towards you.）
wiki_description:
Tame the [dilophosaurus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crimson), making it non-hostile.

- Mutually exclusive with the ⁠[Running Wild](https://bg3.wiki#Running_Wild) inspiration.

title: 荒野的礼物（Gifts of the Wilds）
description: 给出生的物品作为捐赠。（Give raw goods as a donation.）
wiki_description:
Give raw goods as a [donation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nestor).

- Shared with ⁠[Food for the Soul](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Food_for_the_Soul) inspiration.

title: 入伍小鸟（Enlisted Avian）
description: 见到轻羽指挥官。（Meet Commander Lightfeather.）
wiki_description:
Meet [Commander Lightfeather](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Commander_Lightfeather).

- Shared with ⁠[Reporting for Duty](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Reporting_for_Duty) inspiration.

title: 野兽本性（Nature of the Beast）
description: 找出那颗吉斯洋基蛋的命运。（Discover the fate of the githyanki egg.）
wiki_description: Discover the [fate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Lodge#Giving_the_egg_to_the_Society) of the Githyanki egg.

title: 进入底下深处（Down to the Depths Below）
description: 进入铁王座。（Enter the Iron Throne.）
wiki_description:
Enter the [Iron Throne](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Iron_Throne).

- The inspiration is given upon docking the [submersible](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Submersible) at the underwater prison.

title: 化外之民的孩子（Children of an Outlander）
description: 说服贾希拉让她的家人留在城里。（Convince Jaheira to let her family stay in the city.）
wiki_description:
Convince Jaheira to let [her family](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elerrathin%27s_Home) stay in the city.

- Shared with ⁠[Cherishing Family](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Cherishing_Family) inspiration.

title: 你舌头被猫叼走了？（Cat's Got Your Tongue?）
description: 找到丢失的信件。（Find the missing letters.）
wiki_description:
Find the [missing letters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Find_the_Missing_Letters).

- Shared with ⁠[Interrupted Communications](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Interrupted_Communications) inspiration.

title: 灾难性结构失败（Catastrophic Structural Failure）
description: 炸掉钢铁卫士铸造厂。（Blow up the Steel Watch Foundry.）
wiki_description: Blow up the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 地平线行者（Horizon Walker）
description: 穿过希望之邸传送门。（Travel through the House of Hope portal.）
wiki_description:
Travel through the [House of Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Hope) portal.

- The inspiration is given upon arrival.

- Shared with ⁠[An Exotic Charter](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sage#An_Exotic_Charter) inspiration.

title: 庄严告别（Solemn Farewell）
description: 见证古尔葬礼。（Witness the Gur funeral.）
wiki_description:
Witness the [Gur funeral](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gur_Camp).

- Available only if [Astarion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Astarion) was not betrayed to the [Gur hunter](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gandrel) in [Act One](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Act_One).

- Shared with ⁠[Skald's Song](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Skald's_Song) inspiration.

title: 既然我得不到...（If I Can't Have It...）
description: 在全部3具卓尔法师尸体身上发掘出精金熔炉的秘密。（Discover the secrets of the Adamantine Forge from all three drow wizards.）
wiki_description:
Discover the secrets of the the [Adamantine Forge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Adamantine_Forge_(quest)) from all three drow wizards.

- The party must pass the ability checks to decipher the following 3 items:

- [Memory Shard](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Memory_Shard) taken from [Dhourn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dhourn)

- [Scribbled Notes](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Scribbled_Notes) written by [Filro](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Filro)

- [The Great Furnace of Grymforge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Great_Furnace_of_Grymforge) found on the corpse of [Xargrim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Xargrim)

title: 分裂之秘（Secrets of the Sundering）
description: 解锁并阅读《逝去诸神之书》。（Unlock and read the Book of Dead Gods.）
wiki_description:
Unlock and read the [Book of Dead Gods](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Book_of_Dead_Gods).

- Shared with ⁠[Divinity Undone](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Divinity_Undone) inspiration.

title: 女族长之秘（Secrets of the Matron）
description: 阅读卓尔女族长撰写的难解文书。（Read the obscure text by a drow matron.）
wiki_description:
Read the [obscure text](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/On_Educating_the_Faithful) by a [drow](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Drow) matron.

- This book is in the forgotten drow stash at X: 84 Y: -207.

title: 林地根须（Roots of the Grove）
description: 从德鲁伊壁画上了解到当地历史。（Learn local history from the druidic frescos.）
wiki_description:
Learn local history from the druidic frescos.

- Requires passing ability checks on all four frescos (a  DC 5 [History](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/History) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check), a  DC 10 [Intelligence](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Intelligence) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check), and two  DC 10 [Religion](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Religion) [Checks](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check)) in the [Inner Sanctum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Inner_Sanctum) of the Emerald Grove.

- This inspiration is also granted if the checks are passed by different party members.

title: 复活（Reanimator）
description: 听从盖尔的指引，正确将其复活。（Correctly follow Gale's instructions to resurrect him.）
wiki_description:
Correctly follow [Gale's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gale) instructions to resurrect him.

- Only the party member interacting with Gale's flute gets the inspiration.

- Alternatively, the [Scroll (Gale's Pouch)](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Scroll_(Gale%27s_Pouch)) can be thrown into the lava at [Grymforge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Grymforge) while a Sage character is within 6 meters of that spot.

title: 自然联盟（A Natural Alliance）
description: 认出德鲁伊与竖琴手盔甲。（Recognise the druid and Harper armour.）
wiki_description:
Recognise the druid and Harper armour.

- A party member must interact with either of the two skeletons under the broken bridge at X: -9 Y: 498 and pass a  DC 10 [History](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/History) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check).

- If the party had passed a History check on the "Union" fresco in the [Inner Sactum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Inner_Sanctum#Frescos), the inspiration is gained without another check.[[2]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-2)

title: 禁忌奥术（The Forbidden Arcane）
description: 阅读奥米伦关于灵吸怪魔法的笔记。（Read Omeluum's notes on illithid magic.）
wiki_description:
Read [Omeluum's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Omeluum) [notes](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/On_Illithids,_Volume_XXVI) on illithid magic.

- Can be purchased from Omeluum after completing ⁠[Help Omeluum Investigate the Parasite](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Help_Omeluum_Investigate_the_Parasite) or from [Nansi Gretta](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nansi_Gretta) in the [Lower City](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lower_City).

title: 月相之谜（The Phases Unfold）
description: 解开封锁通往幽暗地域大门的月相谜题。（Solve the moon puzzle sealing the door to the Underdark.）
wiki_description:
Solve the moon puzzle sealing the door to the [Underdark](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Underdark).

- The puzzle can be solved even after opening the passage to the Underdark via the hidden lever and the inspiration will still be granted.

title: 死灵法师之秘（Secrets of the Necromancer）
description: 发现塞尔典籍的奇特属性。（Discover the strange nature of the Thayan tome.）
wiki_description: Discover the strange nature of the [Thayan tome](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Necromancy_of_Thay).

title: 知识无价（All Knowledge Is Worth Having）
description: 完成对塞尔死灵法术典籍的阅读。（Finish reading the Thayan tome of necromancy.）
wiki_description: Finish reading the [Thayan tome of necromancy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Necromancy_of_Thay).

title: 暗影德鲁伊之秘（Secrets of the Shadow Druids）
description: 发现并阅读法多的颂歌。（Discover and read Faldorn's Canticle.）
wiki_description:
Discover and read [Faldorn's Canticle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Faldorn%27s_Canticle:_The_Shadow_Druids%27_Doctrine).

- This book is in the locked chest in the [Inner Sanctum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Inner_Sanctum#Servants'_Quarters) of the [Emerald Grove](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Emerald_Grove)

title: 孤独的蜘蛛（A Solitary Spider）
description: 阅读位于井底的蛛法师日志。（Read the arachnomancer's journals at the bottom of the well.）
wiki_description:
Read the arachnomancer's journals at the [bottom of the well](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Whispering_Depths#Arachnomancer's_chamber).

- There are four journals to be read: [Bloody Journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bloody_Journal), [Burnt Journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Burnt_Journal), [Tattered Journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Tattered_Journal), and [Web-Covered Journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Web-Covered_Journal). The inspiration is given after reading them all regardless of the order.

- The Sage character is not necessarily the one to read the journals.

title: 轻语树之秘（Secrets of the Sussur Tree）
description: 使用轻语树花让一个奥术炮塔失效。（Disable an arcane turret using a sussur flower.）
wiki_description: Disable an [arcane turret](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arcane_Turret) using a [sussur flower](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sussur_Bloom).

title: 大酋长之秘（Secrets of the High Chieftain）
description: 阅读瓦罗的地精之书。（Read Volo's Guide to Goblins.）
wiki_description:
Read [Volo's Guide To Goblins](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/On_Goblins:_My_Life_Among_the_Conquering_Host).

- This book is owned by [Booyahg Piddle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Piddle) on the top of one of the towers in the central part of the outer camp.

title: 熄灭的火花（Snuffed Spark）
description: 找到死去的阿斯莫的日志。（Find the dead aasimar's journal.）
wiki_description:
Find the [dead aasimar's journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Olam%27s_Journal).

- Shared with ⁠[Blessed's Final Rest](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Blessed's_Final_Rest).

title: 唤醒沉睡者（Waking the Sleeper）
description: 将阿尔特从他紧张的酣睡中唤醒。（Wake Art from his catatonic slumber.）
wiki_description: Wake [Art](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Art) from his catatonic slumber.

title: 大脑震爆！（Brain Blast!）
description: 成功完成夺心魔殖民地里的思想谜题。（Successfully complete the mind puzzle in the mind flayer colony.）
wiki_description: Successfully complete the [mind puzzle](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Brain_Mapping_Puzzle) in the [mind flayer colony](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mind_Flayer_Colony).

title: 失落之信条（Tenets of Loss）
description: 打开进入莎尔信徒庇护所的路。（Open the way into the Sharran Sanctuary.）
wiki_description: Open the way into the [Sharran Sanctuary](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharran_Sanctuary).

title: 彻底腐败（Corrupted Beyond Recognition）
description: 找到并阅读死去德鲁伊的日志，了解幽影诅咒是如何产生的。（Find and read the dead druid's journal about how the shadow curse came to be.）
wiki_description:
Find and read the [Dead Druid's Journal](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dead_Druid%27s_Journal) about how the shadow curse came to be.

- The journal is on the skeleton at X: 109 Y: 183.

title: 背弃医誓（Hippocratic No More）
description: 找到外科医生的研究笔记。（Find the surgeon's research notes.）
wiki_description:
Find the [Surgeon's Research Notes](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Surgeon%27s_Research_Notes).

- This journal is in the [laboratory](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Healing#Laboratory) of the [House of Healing](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Healing) morgue.

title: 死灵法师之秘（Secrets of the Necromancer）
description: 解开巴萨扎尔秘密书房的谜题。（Solve Balthazar's secret study puzzle.）
wiki_description: Discover the strange nature of the [Thayan tome](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Necromancy_of_Thay).

title: 对怪奇之物有点太熟悉了...（A Little Too Familiar with the Grotesque...）
description: 在不出错的情况下解开巴萨扎尔秘密书房的谜题。（Solve Balthazar's secret study puzzle without making a mistake.）
wiki_description: Solve [Balthazar's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar) secret [study](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers#Balthazar's_chambers) puzzle without making a mistake.[[3]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-DoubleInsp-3)

title: 爱过失去过（To Have Loved and Lost）
description: 发现凯瑟里克遗憾的源头。（Discover the source of Ketheric's shame.）
wiki_description:
Discover the [source](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Letter_to_Ketheric) of Ketheric's shame.

- The letter is in the locked chest in [Moonrise_Towers#Ketheric's chambers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers#Ketheric's_chambers).

- Shared with the ⁠[Ketheric's Loss](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Ketheric's_Loss) inspiration.

title: 赛斯克战术家（Theskan Tactician）
description: 帮助摩尔下赢枪板棋。（Help Mol win the game of lanceboard.）
wiki_description:
Help [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) win the game of lanceboard.

- Shared with ⁠[Helping the Little Guy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Helping_the_Little_Guy), ⁠[Orphan Camaraderie](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Urchin#Orphan_Camaraderie), and ⁠[Shuffling the Board](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Shuffling_the_Board) inspirations (the latter in case of rigging the board).

title: 鼠王（Rat King）
description: 发现莎尔铸铁神殿中众多老鼠背后的真相。（Discover the truth behind the numerous rats in the Gauntlet of Shar.）
wiki_description:
[Discover the truth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Break_Yurgir%27s_Contract) behind the numerous rats in the Gauntlet of Shar.

- Shared with ⁠[Sole Survivor](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Sole_Survivor) inspiration.

title: 历史从不忘记（History Never Forgets）
description: 打开进入莎尔铸铁神殿的路。（Open the way into the Gauntlet of Shar.）
wiki_description:
Open the way into the Gauntlet of Shar.

- The inspiration is granted after successfully solving the fresco puzzle in the [Grand Mausoleum](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Grand_Mausoleum).

title: 参与当地习俗（Partaking in Local Customs）
description: 在莎尔信徒庇护所中进行仪式。（Perform the ritual in the Sharran Sanctuary.）
wiki_description:
Perform the ritual in the [Sharran Sanctuary](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sharran_Sanctuary).

- Shared with ⁠[Honing the Darkness](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Acolyte#Honing_the_Darkness) inspiration.

title: 他们在墙里！（They're in the Walls!）
description: 发现"肉声"是什么。（Discover what the 'meat sound' is.）
wiki_description:
Discover what the 'meat sound' is.

- Interact with the [Cracked Wall](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cracked_wall) up over the kitchen area (accessible from the [Moonrise_Towers#Rafters](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers#Rafters))

- Select "Do Nothing" or fail the first ability check to activate the cutscene where the [Absolute](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Absolute) introduces itself

- Shared with ⁠[A Different Kind of Muse](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#A_Different_Kind_of_Muse) inspiration.

title: 索姆家族秘密（Thorm Family Secrets）
description: 发现凯瑟里克家族成员们的命运归宿。（Discover the fate of Ketheric's family members.）
wiki_description:
Discover the fate of [Ketheric's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric) family members.

- Requires interacting with Ketheric, [Isobel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Isobel), [Gerringothe Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Thisobald Thorm](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm). The order is irrelevant.

title: 月之少女的徽记（Emblem of the Moonmaiden）
description: 发现暗夜之歌的真相。（Discover the truth about Nightsong.）
wiki_description: Discover the truth about the [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin).

title: 异质特许（An Exotic Charter）
description: 获得进入希望之邸传送门的方法。（Obtain access to the House of Hope portal.）
wiki_description:
Obtain access to the [House of Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Hope) portal.

- Granted after actually entering the House of Hope through the portal.

- Shared with the ⁠[Horizon Walker](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Outlander#Horizon_Walker) inspiration.

title: 大奖！（A Grand Prize!）
description: 看穿阿卡比的把戏并获得"大"奖。（Figure out Akabi's scheme and obtain the 'grand' prize.）
wiki_description:
Figure out [Akabi's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Akabi) scheme and obtain the 'grand' prize.

- Pickpocket the [Djinni Ring](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Djinni_Ring) from Akabi and then win the jackpot. The inspiration is granted after Akabi awards you the "prize".

- [Bards](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Bard) have an option to [win](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Akabi#Winning_the_jackpot) the game without pickpocketing the djinni.

title: 同名之物（Crossing's Namesake）
description: 发现飞龙关地下的不朽哨兵。（Discover the undying sentinel underneath Wyrm's Crossing.）
wiki_description:
Find the [undying sentinel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ansur) underneath Wyrm's Crossing.

- Granted after interacting with the wyrm in [The Wyrmway](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Wyrmway).

title: 必承其重（Heavy is the Head）
description: 找到博德安之盔。（Find the Helm of Balduran.）
wiki_description:
Find the [Helm of Balduran](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Helm_of_Balduran).

- Shared with ⁠[Great Helm of Legends](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Soldier#Great_Helm_of_Legends) inspiration.

title: 盟约之血（Blood of the Covenant）
description: 了解阿拉吉血液实验的进展。（Found out how Araj's blood experiments are going.）
wiki_description: Find out how [Araj's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Araj_Oblodra) blood experiments are going.

title: 船长归来（The Returned Cap'n）
description: 见到容光焕发的真格雷斯利船长。（Behold the true Captain Grisly in all her piratical glory.）
wiki_description:
Behold the true [Captain Grisly](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Quenora_Grisly) in all her piratical glory.

- To obtain the inspiration, the party must permanently kill [Auntie Ethel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Auntie_Ethel) without first fighting her pawns separately in [The Blushing Mermaid - Basement](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/The_Blushing_Mermaid_-_Basement), and spare Grisly in the fight. If Grisly is knocked out before Ethel dies, the inspiration is not granted, even if talking to her afterwards in the tavern.

title: 恐惧之主的加冕（Coronation of the Dreadmaster）
description: 到飞龙岩要塞见戈塔什并见证他的加冕。（Meet Gortash in Wyrm's Rock and witness his coronation.）
wiki_description:
Meet [Gortash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Enver_Gortash) in Wyrm's Rock and witness his coronation.

- Shared with ⁠[Personal Invitation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Personal_Invitation) inspiration.

title: 阻止历史重演（Stopping the Repetition of History）
description: 击败洛若坎。（Defeat Lorroakan.）
wiki_description: Defeat [Lorroakan](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lorroakan).

title: 当代的卡尔萨斯（The Karsus of Our Times）
description: 将暗夜之歌交给洛若坎。（Give Nightsong to Lorroakan.）
wiki_description: Give [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin) to Lorroakan.

title: 复兴才智（Rennaissant Ingenuity）
description: 找出为印刷机提供能量的机器。（Uncover the machinery powering the printing press.）
wiki_description: Uncover the machinery powering the [printing press](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Stop_the_Presses).

title: 新常态（New Normal）
description: 让一个钢铁卫士扫描你。（Let yourself be scanned by a Steel Watcher.）
wiki_description:
Let yourself be scanned by a [Steel Watcher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watcher).

- The inspiration can be obtained only at the [South Span Checkpoint](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/South_Span_Checkpoint) when first interacting with a Steel Watcher. If the party gain access to the Wyrm's Crossing by any means of bypass, it cannot be gained anymore.

title: 入会许可（Membership Admittance）
description: 请求加入光耀会。（Ask to join the Society of Brilliance.）
wiki_description: Ask [Havkelaag](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Havkelaag) to join the [Society of Brilliance](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Society_of_Brilliance).

title: 跨位面密探的助手（Assistant to the Extra-Planar Agent）
description: 接手瓦莱里亚的连环杀人案调查。（Take up Valeria's serial killer investigation.）
wiki_description:
Take up [Valeria's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Valeria) serial killer investigation.

- The party must offer their help to [Sister Yannis](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yannis) in the [Open Hand Temple](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Open_Hand_Temple) after Valeria leaves.

- Shared with ⁠[Drama Sleuth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Drama_Sleuth) and ⁠[Trusting Your Instincts](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Trusting_Your_Instincts) inspirations

title: 正确手段（Using the Proper Means）
description: 找到并使用驱散火炬。（Find and use the Torch of Revocation.）
wiki_description:
Find and use the [Torch of Revocation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Torch_of_Revocation).

- Obtainable only if [Oskar Fevras](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oskar_Fevras) was saved from the [Zhentarim Basement](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim_Basement) in [Act One](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Act_One).

title: 肮脏又惊人的展示（A Foul and Awesome Display）
description: 使用乌尔布伦的符文火药炸弹。（Use Wulbren's runepowder bomb.）
wiki_description:
Use the [Runepowder Bomb](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Runepowder_Bomb) given by [Wulbren](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren).

- Granted even if the bomb is used not in the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 心之知识（Knowledge of the Heart）
description: 从新的视角看看你和一个同伴的关系。（Get a fresh perspective on your relationship with a companion.）
wiki_description:
Get a fresh perspective on your relationship with a companion.

- Get the best possible outcome from [Zethino's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zethino) relationship quiz.[[4]](https://bg3.wiki#cite_note-4)

- The Sage character is not necessarily either the one taking the quiz or their romantic partner.

title: 幽冥之助（Whispers from the Grave）
description: 从与死者的对话中获取情报。（Glean some wisdom from speaking with the dead.）
wiki_description: Glean some wisdom from [speaking with the dead](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Speak_with_Dead).

title: 溺毙于黑暗（Drowned in the Dark）
description: 击败在黑檀湖巡逻的灰矮人。（Defeat the duergar patrolling on the Ebonlake.）
wiki_description: Defeat the [duergar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Duergar) patrolling on the Ebonlake.

title: 唱响征服（Conquer the Conquerors）
description: 击败吉斯洋基劫掠队。（Defeat the githyanki raiding squad.）
wiki_description:
Defeat the Githyanki raiding squad. Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Silver Blades, Silver Tongue](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Silver_Blades,_Silver_Tongue).

- Requires actually fighting them; a peaceful resolution will not grant inspiration.

title: 猎王者（A Headless Horde）
description: 杀死地精营地的所有头目。（Kill every leader in the goblin camp.）
wiki_description:
Kill every leader in the goblin camp. Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Slaughter's Prize](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Slaughter's_Prize) and ⁠[Guardian of the Forgotten](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Guardian_of_the_Forgotten).

- [Dror Ragzlin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dror_Ragzlin), [Gut](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gut), and [Minthara](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Minthara) are the relevant leaders.

title: 准备战斗！（To Arms!）
description: 帮盖克斯学习如何战斗。（Help Guex learn how to fight.）
wiki_description: Help [Guex](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guex) learn to fight.

title: 九狱战士（Warrior of the Hells）
description: 杀死追杀卡菈克的教团首领。（Kill the cultist leader seeking Karlach.）
wiki_description: Kill the [cultist leader](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Anders) seeking [Karlach](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Karlach).

title: 命令链（Chain of Command）
description: 在燃烧着的旅店中听从焰拳的指示。（Follow Flaming Fist orders at the burning inn.）
wiki_description: Follow [Flaming Fist](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Flaming_Fist) orders at the [burning inn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Waukeen%27s_Rest). This is earned after knocking down the door.

title: 一个不能少（No One Left Behind）
description: 确保林地所有防御者从第一波地精袭击中幸存。（Ensure all of the Grove's defenders survive the first goblin assault.）
wiki_description:
Ensure all of the [Grove's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Emerald_Grove) defenders survive the first goblin assault.

- [Kanon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kanon) dying in the prior cutscene does not prevent getting this.

title: 老练处刑（Masterful Execution）
description: 在一轮战斗中杀死幽影诅咒之地内部以及周围的任何守关首领。（Kill any of the bosses in and around the Shadow-Cursed Lands in a single round of combat.）
wiki_description: Kill any of the bosses in and around the [Shadow-Cursed Lands](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Shadow-Cursed_Lands) in a single round of combat.

title: 百年对手（Centennial Rivalries）
description: 完成竖琴手的伏击。（Complete the Harper ambush.）
wiki_description: Complete the Harper ambush.

title: 月之护盾（Shield of the Moon）
description: 从伊索贝尔处获得塞伦涅的祝福。（Obtain Selûne's blessing from Isobel.）
wiki_description: Obtain Selûne's blessing from Isobel.

title: 至上的破坏（Absolute Devastation）
description: 摧毁终焉光芒。（Destroy Last Light.）
wiki_description: Destroy Last Light.

title: 战争不是儿戏（War is No Place for a Child）
description: 向阿拉贝尔谎报她父母的结局。（Lie to Arabella about her parents' fate.）

title: 了解你的敌人（Know Thine Enemy）
description: 在莎尔铸铁神殿的镜像试炼中打败你自己。（Defeat yourself in the Gauntlet of Shar's mirror trial.）
wiki_description: Defeat yourself in the [Gauntlet of Shar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gauntlet_of_Shar)'s mirror trial.

title: 至上真神的毁灭（Devastation of the Absolute）
description: 完成对月出的进攻。（Complete the assault on Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Complete the assault on Moonrise.

title: 剔骨（A Bone To Pick）
description: 在袭击中战胜月出监狱里的骷髅。（Overcome the skeletons in Moonrise prison during the assault.）
wiki_description: Overcome the skeletons in Moonrise prison during the assault.

title: 财富之战士（Soldier of Fortune）
description: 将暗夜之歌交给凯瑟里克。（Give Nightsong to Ketheric.）
wiki_description:
Give [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Aylin) to [Ketheric](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ketheric).

- Allow [Balthazar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar) to transport Nightsong from the Shadowfell.

title: 信仰之战士（Soldier of Faith）
description: 拯救并释放暗夜之歌。（Save and release Nightsong.）
wiki_description: Save and release Nightsong.

title: 每天一苹果，手术远离我（An Apple a Day Keeps the Scalpel Away）
description: 在没有接受手术的情况下打败外科医生。（Defeat the Surgeon without being operated upon.）
wiki_description: Defeat the [Surgeon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm) without being operated upon.

title: 退回发件者（Return to Sender）
description: 杀死血甲魔，将其送还给拉斐尔。（Kill the orthon, returning him to Raphael.）
wiki_description: Kill the [orthon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir), returning him to [Raphael](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Raphael).

title: 最好的进攻就是胡说八道（The Best Offence is Virtually Nonsense）
description: 在不使用武器的情况下击败索姆家族的一名成员。（Defeat a member of the Thorm family without drawing steel.）
wiki_description:
Defeat a member of the Thorm family without drawing steel.

- [Gerringothe](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Thisobald](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm) can each be eliminated via a series of skill checks.

title: 最好的进攻就是胡说八道（The Best Offence is Virtually Nonsense）
description: 在不使用武器的情况下击败索姆家族的一名成员。（Defeat a member of the Thorm family without drawing steel.）
wiki_description:
Defeat a member of the Thorm family without drawing steel.

- [Gerringothe](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Thisobald](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm) can each be eliminated via a series of skill checks.

title: 有缺口的盔甲（Notched Armour）
description: 向熊地精商人显摆你的能力。（Show off your prowess to the bugbear merchant.）
wiki_description: Show off your prowess to the [bugbear merchant](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lann_Tarv).

title: 弑亲惨案（Familicide）
description: 杀死索姆家族的所有成员。（Kill all members of the Thorm family.）
wiki_description:
Kill all members of the Thorm family.

- This includes only [Gerringothe](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gerringothe_Thorm), [Malus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Malus_Thorm), and [Thisobald](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Thisobald_Thorm).

title: 战争的现实（Realities of War）
description: 告诉阿拉贝尔她父母身上发生了什么。（Tell Arabella what happened to her parents.）
wiki_description: Tell Arabella what happened to her parents.

title: 波动中创新（Innovations in Volatility）
description: 第二次将你的血交给阿拉吉。（Give your blood to Araj a second time.）
wiki_description: Give your blood to [Araj](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Araj_Oblodra) a second time.

title: 伟大的传奇之盔（Great Helm of Legends）
description: 找到博德安之盔。（Find the Helm of Balduran.）
wiki_description: Find the [Helm of Balduran](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Helm_of_Balduran).

title: 鲁道夫·万·里奇托福我的尸体（Rudolph Van Richtover My Dead Body）
description: 击败飞升的卡扎多尔。（Defeat the Ascended Cazador.）
wiki_description: Defeat the Ascended [Cazador](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cazador_Szarr).

title: 移除混乱者（Removing Chaotic Actors）
description: 消灭地底侏儒叛军的首领。（Remove the head of the deep gnome insurrectionists.）
wiki_description:
Remove the head of the [deep gnome insurrectionists](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Angleiron%27s_Cellar).

- This requires saving Wulbren from [Moonrise Towers](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Moonrise_Towers), but then killing him as part of [Deal with the Gnomes](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Deal_with_the_Gnomes).

title: 爱那个味道（Love That Smell）
description: 协助地底侏儒并用符文火药炸弹摧毁钢铁卫士铸造厂。（Aid the deep gnomes and use the runepowder bomb to blow up the Steel Watch Foundry.）
wiki_description: Aid the deep gnomes and use the Runepowder Bomb to blow up the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 分享战利品（Sharing the Spoils）
description: 给难民捐赠。（Donate to the refugees.）
wiki_description: [Donate](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nestor) to the refugees.

title: 老兵聚集点（Veteran's Hotspot）
description: 在精灵之歌酒馆买一个房间。（Purchase a room at the Elfsong Tavern.）
wiki_description: Purchase a room at the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

title: 逃离火线（Hot Exit）
description: 逃离希望之邸。（Escape the House of Hope.）
wiki_description: Escape the [House of Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Hope).

title: 大法官（Court Marshall）
description: 揭露焰拳逃兵。（Expose the Flaming Fist deserter.）
wiki_description: Expose the [Flaming Fist deserter](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Fist_Reynash).

title: 弑君（Regicide）
description: 处决戈塔什。（Execute Gortash.）
wiki_description: Execute [Gortash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Gortash).

title: 双连击（Double-Tap）
description: 再次杀死埃赛尔婶婶（Kill Auntie Ethel... again...）
wiki_description: Kill [Auntie Ethel](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Auntie_Ethel)... again...

title: 老命呜呼（Kicking the Rust Bucket）
description: 摧毁一个钢铁卫士。（Destroy a Steel Watcher.）
wiki_description: Destroy a Steel Watcher.

title: 报到（Reporting for Duty）
description: 向轻羽指挥官报告。（Report to Commander Lightfeather.）
wiki_description: Report to [Commander Lightfeather](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Commander_Lightfeather).

title: 安息过往（Putting the Past to Rest）
description: 处决奥林。（Execute Orin.）
wiki_description: Execute [Orin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Orin).

title: 黑暗中的刀子（Knives in the Dark）
description: 在莎尔信徒修道院的对峙中存活。（Survive the confrontation in the Sharran Cloister.）
wiki_description: Survive the confrontation in the [Sharran Cloister](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Cloister_of_Sombre_Embrace).

title: 紧急通信（Urgent Communications）
description: 与耐色脑交流。（Commune with the Netherbrain.）
wiki_description:
Commune with the [Netherbrain](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Netherbrain).

- Talk to [Edenosa](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Manip_Edenosa) after the ambush in the park.

title: 战术家（Strategist）
description: 一击消灭一个强大敌人。（Destroy a powerful foe in one strike.）
wiki_description: Defeat a powerful foe in one strike.

title: 五连杀（Pentacrush）
description: 一个回合内击杀5名敌人。（Kill 5 enemies in a single turn.）
wiki_description: Kill 5 enemies in a single turn.

title: 传说故事（One for the Ages）
description: 在一场战斗中击杀10名或更多敌人并幸存。（Survive a fight in which you kill ten or more enemies.）
wiki_description:
Survive a fight in which you kill ten or more enemies.

- Summoned creatures that disappear when their summoner dies count toward this.

title: 我看谁敢（Not On My Watch）
description: 从卡哈和她的毒蛇手中救出阿拉贝尔。（Save Arabella from Kagha and her serpent.）
wiki_description:
Save [Arabella](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arabella) from [Kagha](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Kagha) and her serpent. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Snake Whisperer](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Snake_Whisperer).

- This is earned as soon as Arabella is rescued.

title: 手快有手慢无（You Can't Take It with You）
description: 在复仇之炉的侏儒尸体被扔进河里之前进行搜刮。（Loot the dead gnomes in Grymforge before their corpses are thrown into the river.）
wiki_description:
Loot the dead gnomes in [Grymforge](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Grymforge) before their corpses are thrown into the river.

- You must specifically acquire the [Fetish of Callarduran Smoothhands](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Fetish_of_Callarduran_Smoothhands) in order to get this.

title: 消灭魔笛手（Slaying the Piper）
description: 从鸟妖手中救出米尔克。（Rescue Mirkon from the harpies.）
wiki_description: Rescue [Mirkon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mirkon) from the harpies. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Protector of the Small](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Folk_Hero#Protector_of_the_Small) and mutually exclusive with ⁠[The Allure of Coin](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#The_Allure_of_Coin).

title: 人是铁饭是钢（Hunger Never Fades）
description: 在拉斐尔的希望之邸中吃个肚子溜圆。（Fill your plate at Raphael's House of Hope.）
wiki_description:
Fill your plate at [Raphael's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Raphael) [House of Hope](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/House_of_Hope).

- On the first introduction cutscene, choose the option Ignore him and fill your plate.

title: 明星偶像（Idolatry）
description: 帮助摩尔窃取西凡那斯神像。（Help Mol steal the Idol of Silvanus.）
wiki_description: Help [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) steal the [Idol of Silvanus](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Idol_of_Silvanus). This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Heretic](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Criminal#Heretic).

title: 家人优先（Family Comes First）
description: 说服梅里道出护符的真相。（Encourage Meli to tell the truth about the amulet.）
wiki_description: Encourage [Meli](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Meli) to tell the truth about the amulet. Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Protect Your Own](https://bg3.wiki#Protect_Your_Own).

title: 提前预支（Paying It Forward）
description: 给摩尔投资让她在博德之门成立公会。（Give Mol money to found a guild in Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description:
Give [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) money to found a guild in Baldur's Gate.

- Saving or helping several childen in the Grove eventually leads to this option. The party must side with [Meli](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Meli), let [Mattis](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mattis) and [Silfy](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Silfy) rob the party by failing a  DC 15 [Perception](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Perception) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) while in the trading screen and waiting a few seconds to let them steal, talk to [Doni](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Doni), pass a  DC 10 [Investigation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigation) or [Perception](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Perception) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check), then talk to [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol).

title: 庞氏骗局（Pyramid Scheme）
description: 不花钱并说服食人魔为你服务。（Convince the ogres to work for you without giving them gold.）
wiki_description: Convince [the ogres](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lump_the_Enlightened) to work for you without giving them gold. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Creatures of Bloodlust](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Haunted_One#Creatures_of_Bloodlust) and ⁠[Bodyguards for Hire](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Noble#Bodyguards_for_Hire).

title: 七窍玲珑（Artful Dodger）
description: 取走马蒂斯的戒指以得到他的尊重。（Earn Mattis' respect by taking his ring.）
wiki_description:
Earn [Mattis'](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mattis) respect by taking his ring. This inspiration is shared with ⁠[Made You Look](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Made_You_Look).

- The interacting party member must pass a  DC 15 [Sleight of Hand](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sleight_of_Hand) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check) through dialogue to get both inspirations.

-  [Rogues](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Rogue) have  [Advantage](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Advantage) and only need to pass a  DC 10 [Sleight of Hand](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Sleight_of_Hand) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check).

title: 幼童无罪（Born Innocent）
description: 从地精手中救出枭熊幼崽。（Save the owlbear cub from the goblins.）
wiki_description: Save the [owlbear cub](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Owlbear_Cub) from the goblins.

title: 护犊子（Protect Your Own）
description: 保护从巴斯身上偷走吊坠的孩子。（Protect the child who took the locket from Barth.）
wiki_description: Protect [the child](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Meli) who took the locket from [Barth](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Barth). Mutually exclusive with ⁠[Family Comes First](https://bg3.wiki#Family_Comes_First).

title: 尊严何价?（What Price Dignity?）
description: 从粉碎机身上偷走脚趾戒指并不被发现。（Steal the toe ring from Crusher without getting caught.）
wiki_description:
Steal the toe ring from [Crusher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Crusher) without getting caught.

- Shared with ⁠[Anything for a Profit](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Charlatan#Anything_for_a_Profit) and mutually exclusive with ⁠[Give Them a Show](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Entertainer#Give_Them_a_Show).

- This must be done through the skill check while kissing Crusher's feet; this ring cannot be obtained through normal pickpocketing.

title: 佣兵英雄（Hero for Hire）
description: 从散塔林会幸存者那里弄到钱。（Get some coin out of the Zhentarim survivors.）
wiki_description: Get some coin out of the [Zhentarim](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Zhentarim) survivors. Pass a  DC 5 [Intimidation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Intimidation) [Check](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ability_check).

title: 叛逆期（Rebellious Phase）
description: 背叛巴萨扎尔。（Betray Balthazar.）
wiki_description: Betray [Balthazar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Balthazar).

title: 不会被遗忘（Will Not Be Forgotten）
description: 逃出地下密牢。（Escape the Oubliette.）
wiki_description:
Escape the [Oubliette](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oubliette).

- As the description hints, this inspiration is awarded when you leave, not when you enter.

title: 新近受难者（Newly Downtrodden）
description: 从凯瑟里克的怒火中救出地精。（Spare the goblins from Ketheric's wrath.）
wiki_description: Spare the goblins from Ketheric's wrath.

title: 巷中猫（Alley Cats）
description: 见到贵族气派的猫和狩猎夺心魔蝌蚪的猫。（Meet both the lordly cat and the tadpole-hunting cat.）
wiki_description: Meet both the [lordly cat](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/His_Majesty) and the [tadpole-hunting cat](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steelclaw).

title: 两次蔑视，两次遗弃（Twice Scorned, Twice Abandoned）
description: 从抓捕者手中救出明萨拉。（Rescue Minthara from her captors.）
wiki_description: Rescue Minthara from her captors.

title: 业余眼镜商（Amateur Optician）
description: 寻找摩尔的眼罩。（Find Mol's eyepatch.）
wiki_description:
Find [Mol's eyepatch](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol%27s_Eyepatch).

- Located in Balthazar's Necrotic Laboratory

title: 孤儿友情（Orphan Camaraderie）
description: 帮助摩尔下赢枪板棋。（Help Mol win the game of lanceboard.）
wiki_description: Help [Mol](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Mol) win the game of lanceboard.

title: 回归野性（Gone Feral）
description: 将被精神控制的豺狼人们从其主人那里放走。（Free the mind-controlled gnolls from their master.）
wiki_description:
Free the mind-controlled gnolls from [their master](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Linsella).

- If failing the skill check in the conversation, the inspiration can still be obtained through straight up combat.

title: 今日善行（Good Deed of the Day）
description: 释放暗夜之歌。（Free Nightsong.）
wiki_description: Free [Nightsong](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Dame_Aylin).

title: 懦弱之力（Strength in Cowardice）
description: 说服血甲魔暂时放过你。（Convince the orthon to spare you, for now...）
wiki_description: Convince [the orthon](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Yurgir) to spare you, for now...

title: 童心未泯（Child at Heart）
description: 和奥利弗玩满两场捉迷藏游戏。（Play both games of hide and seek with Oliver.）
wiki_description: Play both games of hide and seek with [Oliver](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Oliver).

title: 当心陌生人（Wary of Strangers）
description: 拒绝喝下可疑的饮品。（Refuse to drink the suspicious drink.）

title: 逃离（Bugging Out）
description: 帮助乌尔布伦逃离月出。（Help Wulbren escape Moonrise.）
wiki_description: Help [Wulbren](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wulbren) escape Moonrise.

title: 不准偷看！（No Peeking!）
description: 阻止真魂者泽'瑞尔读出你的真实意图。（Block out True Soul Z'rell from reading your true intentions.）
wiki_description: Block out True Soul [Z'rell](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Z%27rell) from reading your intentions.

title: 家，甜蜜的家（Home Sweet Home）
description: 下到博德之门的下层地下室。（Delve into the Undercellar of Baldur's Gate.）
wiki_description: Delve into the [Undercellar](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Guildhall) of Baldur's Gate.

title: 尽你所能（Spare What You Can）
description: 向大谷仓进行一次捐赠。（Give a donation to the big barn.）
wiki_description: [Give a donation](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nestor) to the big barn.

title: 毫无回报（Give Nothing Back）
description: 从大谷仓里拿取捐赠物品。（Take donations from the big barn.）
wiki_description:
Take donations from the [big barn](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Requisitioned_Barn).

- A party member must take items from the locked chest specifically.

title: 久违的安居（Proper Lodging, Finally）
description: 在精灵之歌酒馆获得一个房间。（Obtain a room at the Elfsong Tavern.）
wiki_description: Obtain a room at the [Elfsong Tavern](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elfsong_Tavern).

title: 埃赛尔的疏远（Estrangement of Ethel）
description: 永久消灭埃赛尔婶婶。（Defeat Auntie Ethel permanently.）
wiki_description: Defeat Auntie Ethel permanently.

title: 狡诈密码破译者（Cunning Code Crackers）
description: 找出秘密口令，进入艾弗里的秘密工坊。（Discover the secret passphrase and enter Avery's secret workshop.）
wiki_description: Discover [the secret passphrase](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Investigate_the_Suspicious_Toys#Confronting_Arfur) and enter Avery Sonshal's secret workshop.

title: 收人钱财，帮人藏罪（Easing His Leave, and His Pockets）
description: 勒索焰拳逃兵。（Blackmail the Flaming Fist deserter.）
wiki_description: Blackmail [the Flaming Fist deserter](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Fist_Reynash).

title: 报仇不怕晚（A Dish Served Cold）
description: 摧毁钢铁卫士铸造厂。（Destroy the Steel Watch Foundry.）
wiki_description: Destroy the [Steel Watch Foundry](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watch_Foundry).

title: 永远别相信高处的人（Never Trust Those Above You）
description: 在不与戈塔什做交易的情况下打败他。（Defeat Gortash without making a deal with him.）
wiki_description: Defeat [Gortash](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Enver_Gortash) without making a deal with him.

title: 珍爱家人（Cherishing Family）
description: 说服贾希拉让她的家人留在城里。（Convince Jaheira to let her family stay in the city.）
wiki_description: Convince Jaheira to let [her family](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Elerrathin%27s_Home) stay in the city.

title: 生命的一部分（Part of Life）
description: 说服棺材匠破例一次。（Convince the coffin maker to make an exception.）
wiki_description: Convince the [coffin maker](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Ulkov_Sully) to make an exception.

title: 寻找万娜（Finding Vanra）
description: 找到并救出罗拉被绑架的孩子。（Find and free Lora's abducted child.）
wiki_description: Find and free [Lora's](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Lora_Bergauz) abducted child.

title: 孩童安全（Child Safety）
description: 揭露阿尔弗的陷阱玩具。（Expose Arfur for his booby-trapped toys.）
wiki_description: Expose [Arfur](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur_Gregorio) for his booby-trapped toys.

title: 善意（Good Intentions）
description: 帮助尼娜完成仪式。（Help Nina with her ritual.）
wiki_description: Help [Nina](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Nina_Dortmell) with her ritual.

title: 谁找到归谁（Finders Keepers）
description: 帮助占屋难民保留他们的临时住所。（Help the squatters keep their temporary abode.）
wiki_description: Help the squatters keep their [temporary abode](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Arfur%27s_Mansion).

title: 打倒钢铁压迫者！（Down with the Steel Oppressors!）
description: 击败一个钢铁卫士。（Defeat a Steel Watcher.）
wiki_description: Defeat a [Steel Watcher](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Steel_Watcher).

title: 遍寻角落与缝隙（Through Nooks and Crannies）
description: 在没有通行证或邀请的情况下进入飞龙岩要塞。（Enter Wyrm's Rock without a pass or invitation.）
wiki_description: Enter [Wyrm's Rock](https://bg3.wiki/wiki/Wyrm%27s_Rock) without pass or invitation.
